records.english: ...What a dazzling light!

The hidden power of
Langrisser has been released.

Congratulations,
Ladies and Gentlemen.

I have a splendid
surprise for you.
If you defeat them, you can come
to Velzeria Castle so that I may
kill you personally!
records.machine_korean_reference: 나는 당신을 위한 훌륭한/놀라움을 가지고 있습니다. / 당신이 그들을 물리치면 당신은 올 수 있습니다 / 벨제리아 성으로 가서 내가 당신을 개인적으로 죽일 수도 있습니다!

records.english:
Huh?!
...It was an illusion.
This doesn't look good!

Let's show them the
power of Langrisser!

It seems Lord
overestimated them -
if we use our full power it
would be like slaughtering
lambs. Ah well...
records.machine_korean_reference: 주님이신 것 같다 / 그들을 과대평가했다 - / 우리가 우리의 모든 힘을 다한다면 그것은 / 도살하는 것과 같을 것이다 / 양들을. 아 글쎄...

records.english:
What!?
I've been defeated...
Aaargh!
How awful! It hurts!
No good... I'm beaten...
What skill...
Ahhh Shit! I got beat!

I'm sorry...
I must retreat.

I can't go any further...
Forgive me...
records.machine_korean_reference: 더 이상 갈 수가 없어요... / 용서하세요...

records.english: Damn... I can't win...
ROOOOAR!
Kee kee kee...
Arrrgh!
Gaaaaah!
Graah!
Aroooo...
Aroooo...
Aroooo...

You will die a painful,
wretched death... I shall enjoy
it immensely!
records.machine_korean_reference: 너는 고통스럽고 비참한 죽음으로 죽을 것이다... 나는 즐길 것이다 / 그것을 엄청나게!

records.english:
Why...
Gwaaah!

Let's see how much of
a fight you can put up...
records.machine_korean_reference: 당신이 얼마나 많은 싸움을 할 수 있는지 봅시다...

records.english:
Damn...
The Descendants of Light have
so much power...
records.machine_korean_reference: 젠장... / 빛의 후예들은 / 엄청난 힘을 가지고 있어요...

records.english:
Feel the power of the
Family of Darkness!

Bastards! How dare you!
Your miserable deaths draw ever
closer! I'll put a curse on you!
records.machine_korean_reference: 나쁜 놈들! 감히! / 당신의 비참한 죽음이 점점 가까워지고 있습니다! 당신에게 저주를 걸게요!

records.english:
Ah... You look like you
can entertain me for a while!
records.machine_korean_reference: 아... 당신은 당신처럼 보입니다 / 한동안 나를 즐겁게 해줄 수 있을 것 같아요!

records.english:
Could these be the
Descendants of Light I've heard
rumors of?
Clearly they command enormous
power... We may need to reveal
ours as well.
records.machine_korean_reference: 이게 혹시 / 내가 들어본 빛의 후예 / 소문인가? / 분명히 그들은 막대한 권력을 장악하고 있다 / 권력... 우리는 공개해야 할 수도 있다 / 우리의 것 또한.

records.english:
It's over!
This is the end for you!

Ugh!
I never imagined that there were
humans who could hurt me...
I must retreat...
records.machine_korean_reference: 윽! / 나는 상상도 못했다 / 나를 해칠 수 있는 인간이 있다... / 나는 물러나야 한다...

records.english:
Impossible! How could the
Vampire Lord be beaten...
records.machine_korean_reference: 불가능해요! 어떻게/뱀파이어 로드를 이길 수 있었는지...

records.english:
The Vampire Lord was
defeated...
Still, do not underestimate the
power of the Family of Darkness!
records.machine_korean_reference: 뱀파이어 군주는 / 패배했다... / 그래도 과소평가하지 마라 / 어둠의 가문의 힘!

records.english:
Vampire Lord!
You scum! It's time for you
to know the true terror of
our Family of Darkness!
records.machine_korean_reference: 뱀파이어 로드! / 쓰레기야! 이제 당신이 / 알아야 할 시간입니다 / 우리 어둠의 가족의 진정한 공포를!

records.english:
We finally beat them,
but this was just a taste of
Alhazard's true power...
records.machine_korean_reference: 마침내 그들을 이겼지만 / 하지만 이것은 단지 맛보기에 불과했다 / 알하자드의 진정한 힘...

records.english:
It's unbelievable that he
can summon such monsters...
It's good that we were their
targets this time, but if
they start attacking towns
and things, it will be a
disaster!
records.machine_korean_reference: 그 사람이 / 그런 괴물을 소환할 수 있다는 게 믿기지 않아요... / 이번에는 우리가 그들의 / 표적이 되어 다행이지만 / 그들이 마을을 공격하기 시작하면 / 그 일들은 / 재앙이 될 것입니다!

records.english:
Such frighteningly strong
power...

Alhazard is the root of
all evil. All the monsters in
the world today exist because
of that sword.
Can you see it? The twisted,
dark sky over Velzeria...
records.machine_korean_reference: Alhazard는 근원이다 / 모든 악의 현재 세상의 모든 괴물들은 / 그 검 때문에 존재한다. / 보이나요? 뒤틀린 / 벨제리아 위의 어두운 하늘...

records.english:
Langrisser is the one and
only thing capable of holding it
back. For that reason it can
grant us its unlimited power.
Without Langrisser, Alhazard
would be unstoppable.
records.machine_korean_reference: Langrisser는 그것을 막을 수 있는 유일한 / 유일한 존재입니다. 그러한 이유로 그것은 우리에게 무한한 힘을 부여할 수 있습니다. / Langrisser가 없었다면 Alhazard는 / 막을 수 없었을 것입니다.

records.english:
...So have people been
misusing its power up until now?
records.machine_korean_reference: ...그럼 사람들은 지금까지 그 힘을 오용해 왔나요?

records.english:
They were filled with
greed. What foolishness...
records.machine_korean_reference: 그들은 가득 차 있었습니다 / 탐욕 얼마나 어리석은 일인가...

records.english:
They must've realized
that, but probably felt that
it was worth it.
records.machine_korean_reference: 그들은 깨달았음에 틀림없습니다 / 그것을 그러나 아마도 느꼈을 것입니다 / 그것이 그만한 가치가 있다는 것입니다.

records.english:
The final battle between
Light and Darkness draws near.

At last, we can awaken
Langrisser.
records.machine_korean_reference: 마침내 우리는 깨어날 수 있다 / 랑그릿사.

records.english:
Come on, sister!
Let's go remove the seal!
Yeah!

We must put an end to
this corrupted world.
records.machine_korean_reference: 우리는 종식시켜야 합니다 / 이 타락한 세상을.

records.english:
Alright, let's go!
...To bring peace back to the
world again!
records.machine_korean_reference: 좋아, 가자! / ...다시 / 세상에 평화를 되찾기 위해!

records.english: So you finally made it.

I have something very
interesting to show you.
records.machine_korean_reference: 나는 당신에게 보여줄 매우 흥미로운 것을 가지고 있습니다.

records.english: Miss !

That foolish sorceress
tried sending His Majesty to
another world. It seems that
she underestimated the power
of Alhazard...
records.machine_korean_reference: 그 어리석은 마법사는 / 폐하를 다른 세계로 보내려고 했습니다. 것 같다 / 그녀는 힘을 과소평가했다 / 알하자드의...

records.english:
Wait, . I have no
intention of using hostages;
that is cowardice. This fight
is between me and !
Do not interfere!
records.machine_korean_reference: 잠깐만요. 나는 인질을 사용할 의도가 없습니다. / 그건 비겁한 짓이야. 이 싸움은 / 나와 ! / 방해하지 마세요!

records.english:
Ha ha ha... How quaint
of you . But it suits one
such as yourself. I'll release
this woman; don't regret it.
records.machine_korean_reference: 하하하... 정말 특이해요 / 당신은 . 하지만 그것은 당신과 같은 사람에게 적합합니다. 나는 석방할 것이다 / 이 여자; 후회하지 마세요.

records.english:
I'll go prepare them a
warm welcome. I do hope it won't
be a waste of my time...
records.machine_korean_reference: 내가 가서 그들을 따뜻하게 환영할 준비를 할게요. 나는 그것이 내 시간 낭비가 되지 않기를 바랍니다.

records.english:
! Now we can do
battle to our utmost ability!
records.machine_korean_reference: ! 이제 우리는 최대한의 능력을 발휘하여 전투를 할 수 있습니다!

records.english:
! How can you
fight for such a cause!?
will cause a great
disaster to befall the world
by releasing Alhazard's power!
records.machine_korean_reference: ! 어떻게 그런 대의를 위해 싸울 수 있습니까!? / 대재앙을 일으킬 것이다 / 세상에 닥칠 / 알하자드의 힘을 풀어줌으로써!

records.english:
Please, !
Stop this pointless fighting!

We need power to unify
this war-torn world and bring
true peace! Even if it's the
power of Darkness!
records.machine_korean_reference: 우리는 통일할 힘이 필요합니다 / 전쟁으로 피폐해진 이 세계를 가져오고 / 진정한 평화를! 비록 그것이 어둠의 / 힘이라 할지라도!

records.english:
Sir !
The troops are ready!
We can attack at will!
records.machine_korean_reference: 선생님! / 군대가 준비되었습니다! / 마음대로 공격할 수 있다!

records.english:
At last the final battle
has come...
!
I will show you no mercy!
records.machine_korean_reference: 마침내 마지막 전투가 / 다가왔다... / ! / 나는 당신에게 자비를 베풀지 않을 것입니다!

records.english:
That fool...!
Well it can't be helped, can it.
Let's go!
records.machine_korean_reference: 그 바보...! / 뭐 어쩔 수 없겠죠? / 갑시다!

records.english:
If we lose here, there
is no future for us. Fight
with everything you've got!
You are the Blue Dragon Knights'
elite! The best of the best!
Do not dishonor our reputation!
records.machine_korean_reference: 만약 우리가 여기서 지면 우리에게 미래는 없습니다. 싸우세요 / 당신이 가진 모든 것을 가지고! / 당신은 청룡기사단의 / 엘리트입니다! 최고 중의 최고! / 우리의 명예를 훼손하지 마십시오!

records.english:
...No, I shouldn't say
anything.
records.machine_korean_reference: ...아니요, 아무 말도 하면 안 됩니다 / 아무 것도.

records.english:
Glory to the Empire and
the Blue Dragon Knights!
Attaaack!!

Stop it !
Why? Why must you fight us?
If we all work together,
we can end this war...
records.machine_korean_reference: 그만해! / 왜? 왜 우리와 싸워야 합니까? / 우리 모두 함께 노력한다면 / 우리는 이 전쟁을 끝낼 수 있습니다...

records.english:
Of course if we fight
together we can stop the war.
But some day people will start
fighting again. Even if we end
this war, people will keep
making the same mistakes.
In order to eliminate war,
we must use force to build
a united nation, a utopia.
And I swore to conquer the
continent with His Highness.
That is the quickest way to
achieve a world without war!
And you stand in the way of
that ideal world!
records.machine_korean_reference: 물론 우리가 싸우면 / 함께라면 전쟁을 멈출 수 있습니다. / 하지만 언젠가 사람들은 다시 싸우기 시작할 것이다. 우리가 끝나더라도 / 이 전쟁, 사람들은 계속할 것이다 / 같은 실수를 저지를 것이다. / 전쟁을 없애기 위해 / 우리는 무력을 사용하여 건설해야 합니다 / 통일된 국가, 유토피아를 / 그리고 나는 전하와 함께 / 대륙을 정복하겠다고 맹세했습니다. / 그것이 전쟁 없는 세상을 달성하는 가장 빠른 방법이다! / 그리고 당신은 방해하고 있습니다 / 그 이상적인 세계!

records.english:
Why... Why must you go to
such great lengths? ...Why must
there be so much fighting?
records.machine_korean_reference: 왜... 당신은 왜 가야만 합니까 / 그렇게 먼 길을 가나요? ...왜 반드시 / 그렇게 많은 싸움이 있어야 합니까?

records.english:
I don't desire unnecessary
bloodshed.
The Empire or ...
Whoever has the power will
lead the continent to peace...
records.machine_korean_reference: 나는 불필요한 / 유혈 사태를 원하지 않습니다. / 제국 아니면... / 힘을 가진 자는 / 대륙을 평화로 이끌 것이다...

records.english:
Let's go, !
Don't hold anything back!

After all this, you
still can't see what a mistake
you've made?!
records.machine_korean_reference: 이 모든 일이 있은 후에도, 당신은 / 아직도 당신이 무슨 실수를 했는지 알 수 없습니까?!

records.english:
I was born and raised in
the glorious Empire. I became
the leader of the honorable
Blue Dragon Knights. I cannot
leave the path I've chosen!
records.machine_korean_reference: 나는 태어나고 자랐습니다 / 영광스러운 제국. 나는 되었다 / 명예로운 / 청룡기사단의 리더가 되었다. 나는 내가 선택한 길을 떠날 수 없다!

records.english: Damn!

We've won.
What a tough battle.
Is this the end...?

Hmph... Your skills have
improved , but you won't
get past me!
records.machine_korean_reference: 흠... 당신의 실력은 향상되었지만 당신은 나를 지나칠 수 없을 것입니다!

records.english: I'm done for...
OWWWWWW!
Damn it...
Damn! So careless...
Shit! They got me...
Aieeee!

...
Is there no way to stop this?

...You know how I feel.
I cannot betray the Empire - no,
His Majesty, ; I want
to fight alongside him until the
very end.
records.machine_korean_reference: ...내 기분이 어떤지 알잖아요. / 나는 제국을 배반할 수 없습니다. - 아니오, / 폐하, ; 나는 원한다 / 그와 함께 싸우고 싶다 / 끝까지

records.english:
! There's no one who
despises war more than you do.
Why do you keep fighting?!
records.machine_korean_reference: ! 당신보다 전쟁을 더 경멸하는 사람은 없습니다. / 왜 계속 싸우나요?!

records.english:
It is true that war will
only bring sorrow. However, a
battle does not end until there
is a victor.
Someone must unify the continent
into a utopian state. Conflicts
will be unavoidable to that end.
records.machine_korean_reference: 전쟁이 가져올 것이라는 것은 사실입니다 / 슬픔만 가져올 뿐입니다. 그러나 / 전투는 / 승자가 나올 때까지 끝나지 않습니다. / 누군가는 대륙을 통합해야 한다 / 유토피아적인 국가로 갈등은 / 그 목적을 위해 불가피할 것입니다.

records.english: ...I'm sorry, .
Ahhhh...

Ugh...
This is no good at all...

Even if it costs me
my life, I will defeat you!
Let's go, !
records.machine_korean_reference: 나/내 목숨을 앗아가더라도 나는 당신을 이길 것입니다! / 갑시다, !

records.english: ! It's over!

I won't... let... you...
pass...
Damn!

Sir !
Please fall back!

Sir !
You must withdraw!

I cannot withdraw over
a wound like this!
records.machine_korean_reference: 나는 물러설 수 없다 / 이런 상처는!

records.english:
I cannot permit that!
If you are killed, who shall
defend the Empire of tomorrow?
records.machine_korean_reference: 나는 그것을 허락할 수 없다! / 만약 당신이 죽는다면, 누가 / 내일의 제국을 방어할 것인가?

records.english:
We can't allow
that! If General is killed,
who will protect the Empire of
tomorrow!
records.machine_korean_reference: 우리는 허용할 수 없습니다 / 그건! 장군이 죽으면, / 누가 제국을 지킬 것인가 / 내일!

records.english:
That's right!
This is our duty!

That's right!
This is our duty!

That's right!
This is our duty!
You... all of you...

We'll buy some more time
for you to rally your forces!
records.machine_korean_reference: 시간을 좀 더 벌겠습니다 / 당신이 병력을 집결할 수 있도록!

records.english:
...
Alright.
Stay strong...
Don't get yourself killed.
I won't!
General !

I can't...
die... yet...
Gwaaa!
Uwaaaa!
This is it...

Sir ...
I'm sorry...
Attack!!
Ugh!

Urgh...
Sir ... please... forgive...
me...

We can't let them reach
His Highness!
Attack!!
records.machine_korean_reference: 우리는 그들이 도달하도록 놔둘 수 없습니다 / 전하! / 공격!!

records.english: Prepare yourself!

Sir ...
Looks like... this is the end...
for me...
records.machine_korean_reference: 선생님... / 아무래도... 이게 끝인 것 같네요... / 제겐...

records.english:
!
I won't permit you to die!
Have you been fighting and
risking your life all this
time only to lose it here?
Stay alive, !
records.machine_korean_reference: ! / 나는 당신이 죽는 것을 허락하지 않습니다! / 당신은 싸우고 / 목숨을 걸고 이 모든 것을 / 시간만 보내다가 여기서 패배했습니까? / 살아있어라, !

records.english:
I'm... sorry...
I've failed you...
...for the last... time.
Please... with His Majesty...
make the dream come true...
records.machine_korean_reference: 미안... 미안... / 내가 널 실망시켰어... / ...마지막으로... / 제발... 폐하와 함께... / 꿈을 이루어주세요...

records.english:
I won't let you go to hell
before me! Open you eyes, !
Open them!!
records.machine_korean_reference: 나는 당신을 지옥에 보내지 않을 것입니다 / 나보다 먼저! 눈을 뜨세요, ! / 열어보세요!!

records.english:
...
And now... I've lost my only
friend.
The present age will end soon...
Either we or will lead
the continent into the future.
This is the most fitting eulogy
for all those who sacrificed
their lives for the Empire...
records.machine_korean_reference: ... / 그리고 지금... 나는 나의 유일한 / 친구를 잃었습니다. / 현 시대는 곧 끝날 것이다... / 우리가 이끌거나 이끌 것이다 / 대륙을 미래로. / 이것은 가장 어울리는 추도사입니다 / 희생한 모든 이들에게 / 제국을 위해 목숨을 바쳤습니다...

records.english:
Sir ... It looks
like this the end for me...
Please... with His Majesty...
make the dream come true...
records.machine_korean_reference: 선생님... 제겐 끝이군요... / 제발... 폐하와 함께... / 꿈을 이루어주세요...

records.english:
You've all done well...
But we will not yield any more
ground! We will die before we
let you advance even one step
further!
records.machine_korean_reference: 다들 수고하셨어요... / 하지만 우리는 더 이상 양보하지 않겠습니다 / 땅! 우리는 / 당신이 한 걸음이라도 전진하게 하기 전에 / 더 멀리 죽을 것입니다!

records.english: Argh...!

The Blue
Dragon Knights cannot be
defeated!

Am I all that remains
of the Blue Dragon Knights...?

Give it up, ;
the battle is over!

Pfff, to think that
a man like you could destroy
the Knights...
records.machine_korean_reference: 윽, 생각하다 / 너 같은 남자가 파괴할 수 있다 / 기사단을...

records.english:
But I was the head of the
glorious Blue Dragon Knights!
I will never retreat!
records.machine_korean_reference: 하지만 나는 / 영광스러운 청용기사단의 수장이었다! / 나는 결코 물러서지 않을 것이다!

records.english:
Please , stop! I don't
want to fight you anymore!
records.machine_korean_reference: 제발 그만둬! 나는 더 이상 당신과 싸우고 싶지 않습니다!

records.english:
... I...
No, I have no right to say such
a thing to you.
records.machine_korean_reference: ... 나는... / 아니, 나는 그런 말을 할 권리가 없습니다 / 당신에게.

records.english:
This is the end!
Let's go, !
The oath of knights...
...That idiot...

He was quite inept,
wasn't he...
records.machine_korean_reference: 그 사람은 꽤 무능했어요, / 그렇지 않았나요...

records.english:
Even while I was under
's spell, he treated me
like a normal woman.
There was no one gentler than
him - his heart desired peace...
records.machine_korean_reference: 내가 술에 취한 동안에도 그는 나를 대했습니다 / 평범한 여자처럼. / 그 사람보다 더 온화한 사람은 없었습니다 / 그의 마음은 평화를 원했습니다...

records.english:
...
I sense a surge of evil...
It's very close by...
records.machine_korean_reference: ... / 악의 세력이 솟구치는 느낌이 듭니다... / 아주 가까이 있어요...

records.english:
So... you've finally
arrived, Miss .
I'm reluctant to fight my former
teacher, but there's no getting
around it, I'm afraid. The least
I can do is offer you an easy
death, however.
records.machine_korean_reference: 그럼... 드디어 오셨군요, Miss. / 나는 나의 전 / 선생님과 싸우는 것을 꺼려하지만, 피할 방법이 없습니다 / 그 일을 피할 수 없어서 유감입니다. 하지만 / 내가 할 수 있는 최소한의 일은 당신에게 쉬운 죽음을 제공하는 것입니다.

records.english:
This is the first time
we've fought man-to-man.
records.machine_korean_reference: 이번이 처음입니다 / 우리가 일대일로 싸운 적이 있습니다.

records.english:
I'm gonna send you to
meet your buddies!
records.machine_korean_reference: 나는 당신을 당신의 친구들에게 보내거나 만날 것입니다!

records.english:
My, such strong words...
But can you break through this
gauntlet of magicians?
records.machine_korean_reference: 내, 이렇게 강한 말을... / 그런데 당신은 이 / 마술사의 결투를 뚫을 수 있습니까?

records.english:
This hall is designed
for repelling invaders. In other
words, you've fallen into my
trap.
Miss , I had hoped that
you would be defeated by ,
yet I also wanted you to make
it here alive.
It seems fate has decreed that I
shall be the one to defeat you.
records.machine_korean_reference: 이 홀은 설계되었습니다 / 침입자를 격퇴하기 위해. 달리 말하면, 당신은 나의 / 함정에 빠졌습니다. / 아가씨, 나는 바랐습니다 / 당신이 에게 패배하기를 / 그러나 나는 또한 당신이 만들기를 바랐습니다 / 여기에서 살아남으십시오. / 운명은 내가 / 당신을 이길 사람이 될 것이라고 결정한 것 같습니다.

records.english:
Please give up, !
You once studied magic to fight
against the forces of Darkness;
come learn together with us once
more!
records.machine_korean_reference: 포기해주세요, ! / 당신은 한때 어둠의 세력에 맞서 싸우기 위해 마법을 공부했습니다. / 한 번 / 더 우리와 함께 배우러 오세요!

records.english:
Naturally I knew of the
existence of Darkness, and so I
became your apprentice with the
intent to destroy it.
But when you were reborn,
I learned that had
been revived once again.
I thought I could depend on the
Descendants of Light to defeat
him, but they lacked the power
at that time.
That's when I met His Majesty.
I felt sure that he was capable
of it, so I aided him as he
rebuilt the nation.
records.machine_korean_reference: 당연히 나는 알고 있었다 / 어둠의 존재, 그래서 나는 / 그것을 파괴하려는 의도로 당신의 견습생이 되었습니다. / 하지만 당신이 다시 태어났을 때, / 나는 그것이 / 다시 한 번 부활했다는 것을 알게 되었습니다. / 나는 그를 이길 수 있는 / 빛의 후예에 의지할 수 있다고 생각했다 / 그러나 그들은 힘이 부족했다 / 그 당시. / 그때 폐하를 만났습니다. / 나는 그가 할 수 있다고 확신했다 / 그래서 나는 그가 국가를 재건할 때 그를 도왔다.

records.english:
So that's why you left
Lady in my care...
records.machine_korean_reference: 그래서 당신이 떠난 이유입니다 / 아가씨는 내 보살핌에...

records.english:
Correct.
And that is why we manipulated
to get Alhazard; with
enough power, we can unite the
entire continent.
...And with a martial kingdom
spanning the entire continent,
dealing with the forces of
Darkness would be trivial.
That is why I craved power -
power so dangerous that it
could destroy its master!
records.machine_korean_reference: 맞습니다. / 그리고 그것이 바로 우리가 조작한 이유입니다 / Alhazard를 얻기 위해; / 충분한 힘으로, 우리는 통합할 수 있습니다 / 대륙 전체를 / ...그리고 군왕국에서는 / 대륙 전체에 걸쳐 / 세력을 상대하는 / 어둠의 세력을 다루는 것은 사소한 일일 것입니다. / 그것이 바로 내가 권력을 갈망하는 이유이다. / 권력은 너무나 위험해서 / 그 주인을 파괴할 수 있다!

records.english:
You could certainly
carry out your plan with that
kind of power... but what will
it do to your heart?
records.machine_korean_reference: 당신은 확실히 / 그 정도의 힘으로 당신의 계획을 수행할 수 있습니다... 하지만 그것은 무엇을 할 것입니까 / 그것이 당신의 마음에 영향을 미칠까요?

records.english:
I did not select the
means to this end; it is my
way of life.
records.machine_korean_reference: 나는 이 목적을 위해 / 수단을 선택하지 않았습니다. 그것이 나의 / 삶의 방식이다.

records.english:
HNNN!? You Tenacious
little insects!! I won't let
even one of you reach Emperor
!
records.machine_korean_reference: ㅋㅋㅋ!? 당신은 끈기 있는 / 작은 벌레들입니다!! 나는 허락하지 않을 것이다 / 너희 중 단 한 명이라도 황제에게 도달하도록 / !

records.english:
Your tenacity thus far
has amazed me. But I must take
Langrisser from you now. As long
as we have it, nothing can
threaten the Empire anymore.
records.machine_korean_reference: 지금까지 당신의 끈기는 / 나를 놀라게 했습니다. 하지만 이제 나는 당신에게서 / Langrisser를 빼앗아야 합니다. 우리가 그것을 갖고 있는 한, 그 어떤 것도 더 이상 제국을 위협할 수 없습니다.

records.english:
You know better than
anyone else in the Empire how
dangerous the power of Darkness
is; why would you even attempt
to subdue it?
records.machine_korean_reference: 당신은 더 잘 알고 있습니다 / 제국의 그 누구보다도 / 어둠의 힘이 얼마나 위험한지 / 왜 당신은 그것을 시도하겠습니까 / 그것을 제압하려고 합니까?

records.english:
We must put a stop to
this Age of Darkness. And it's
fine if Langrisser is used to
that end by sealing away Chaos.
...But on the other hand, if we
use and abide by the power of
Darkness, won't the result still
be the same? His Highness has
chosen the latter means.
records.machine_korean_reference: 우리는 멈춰야 합니다 / 이 어둠의 시대. 그리고 Langrisser가 혼돈을 봉쇄함으로써 끝나는 데 익숙해지면 괜찮습니다. / ...하지만 반면에 우리가 / 어둠의 힘을 사용하고 따른다면, 결과는 여전히 / 같지 않을까요? 전하께서는 후자의 수단을 선택하셨습니다.

records.english:
But even if you could,
the power of Darkness leads
people's hearts to chaos -
you might end up like !
records.machine_korean_reference: 하지만 설령 그럴 수 있다 하더라도 / 어둠의 힘은 / 사람들의 마음을 혼돈으로 이끈다 - / 당신은 결국 !

records.english:
That's certainly true
for the weak-willed. But as for
us, we won't know unless we try.
records.machine_korean_reference: 그것은 확실히 사실입니다 / 의지가 약한 사람들에게는 하지만 / 우리에 관해서는, 시도하지 않으면 알 수 없을 것입니다.

records.english:
I simply won't permit
such risky behavior!
records.machine_korean_reference: 나는 단지 허용하지 않을 것이다 / 그런 위험한 행동!

records.english: Found Runestone!
What?! Impossible...

You fought well, but I'm
afraid this is the end for you.
Defying the Empire was truly
reckless of you...
records.machine_korean_reference: 당신은 잘 싸웠지만, 이것이 당신에게 끝이 될까 두렵습니다. / 제국을 거스르는 건 정말 / 무모한 일이었어...

records.english: Damn! This is it...
Damn it! I'm beaten...
Noooo...!

Ugh...
I just can't take it anymore...
records.machine_korean_reference: 으... / 더 이상 참을 수 없어...

records.english: This is it...
Son of a... BITCH!!
Ahhhh... ...

Don't push yourself!
Retreat!
Y-Yes sir...
This can't be...

Your reasoning is
flawed!

That's one perspective.
But there are countless paths to
the same destination, wouldn't
you agree?
records.machine_korean_reference: 그것은 하나의 관점입니다. / 하지만 가는 길은 셀 수 없이 많다 / 같은 목적지에, 그렇지 않겠습니까 / 당신도 동의하시나요?

records.english: Ahhhh!?

How could this happen
now...
records.machine_korean_reference: 어떻게 이런 일이 일어날 수 있니 / 지금...

records.english:
You can't get
away from me!
Urf...!
Ugghhhh!

You bastards
have caused us so much trouble!
records.machine_korean_reference: 너희 개자식들은 / 우리에게 너무 많은 문제를 일으켰어!

records.english:
I cannot let
the Descendants of Light win...
records.machine_korean_reference: 난 놔둘 수 없어 / 빛의 후예들이 이기도록...

records.english: No way...!

You must've
come here because you WANTED
to die!
records.machine_korean_reference: 당신은 틀림없이 / 이곳에 와야 합니다. 왜냐하면 당신이 원했기 때문입니다 / 죽고 싶었습니다!

records.english: Graaaaah!

Sir ...
Urrgh...

Am I about
to die...?

Just a little
more...
Regrettable...

I will defend
Lord till the very end!
Gotcha!

Sir ...
Please... escape...

Heh heh heh...
What a reckless bunch...

I don't think ill of
you, Miss ...
It's too bad that you had to
come this far; now we have no
choice but to fight.
Prepare yourself!
records.machine_korean_reference: 나는 나쁘게 생각하지 않습니다 / 당신, Miss ... / 당신이 해야 했던 것이 너무 안타깝습니다 / 여기까지 와야 했습니다; 이제 우리에게는 싸우는 것 외에는 선택의 여지가 없습니다. / 준비하세요!

records.english: We haven't lost yet...

If you're thinking about
asking for a rematch, we're
ready for you anytime!
records.machine_korean_reference: 재대결을 고려하거나 요청하신다면, 저희는 언제든지 여러분을 맞이할 준비가 되어 있습니다!

records.english:
Are you sure?
You will regret it, boy.
Accept 's challenge?

Very well.
I accept your challenge!

Heh heh heh...
How foolish.
The battle will take place in
Death Tower. It's a magical
structure that I built which
magnifies our power.
You won't win.
You should save in a different
slot, just to be safe.
records.machine_korean_reference: 에헤헤헤... / 정말 어리석군요. / 전투는 / 데스 타워에서 진행됩니다. 그것은 마법이다 / 내가 지은 / 우리의 힘을 확대하는 구조. / 당신은 이길 수 없습니다. / 안전을 위해 다른 / 슬롯에 저장해야 합니다.

records.english:
I have no intention of
waging a pointless battle.
records.machine_korean_reference: 나는 무의미한 싸움을 벌일 생각이 없다.

records.english: I see. How wise of you.

Teacher...
The Descendants of Light you
believed in are unquestionably
strong...
Perhaps... Perhaps they can
change the world...
Thanks to you... I am at peace.
Now I can... go... to hell...
Teacher...
If I had a... second chance...
I could... learn... from you...
once more...
records.machine_korean_reference: 선생님... / 당신이 / 믿었던 빛의 후예들은 틀림없이 / 강합니다... / 아마도... 그들은 아마도 / 세상을 바꿀 수 있을 것입니다... / 덕분에... 저는 평안합니다. / 이제 난... 지옥에... 갈 수 있어... / 선생님... / 만약 나에게... 두 번째 기회가 주어진다면... / 나는... 당신에게서... 배울 수 있을 텐데... / 다시 한 번...

records.english:
...
Why couldn't you wait...

needed enormous
power to fight . And he
needed it urgently, so he got
involved in the forbidden black
arts.
As a result, he acquired immense
magical powers, but his flesh
paid the price - his body was
ruined by the demonic influence.
So he bet what little remained
of his lifespan on the one he
believed in: .
records.machine_korean_reference: 싸우려면 엄청난 / 힘이 필요했습니다. 그리고 그는 / 그것이 긴급하게 필요했기 때문에 금지된 흑인 예술에 참여하게 되었습니다. / 그 결과, 그는 엄청난 / 마법의 힘을 얻었지만, 그의 육체는 / 대가를 치렀습니다. 그의 몸은 / 악마의 영향력에 의해 망가졌습니다. / 그래서 그는 얼마 남지 않은 것을 걸었습니다 / 자신의 수명 중 / 자신이 믿는 사람에게: .

records.english:
Yeah...
He really went too far.

Thanks to , he had to
bid farewell to his teacher, a
truly sad fate.
We must put a stop to this.
records.machine_korean_reference: 덕분에 그는 / 그의 선생님에게 작별을 고해야 했는데, 이것은 / 참으로 슬픈 운명이다. / 우리는 이것을 멈춰야 합니다.

records.english:
It's time to close the
book of history on Darkness...
records.machine_korean_reference: 이제 어둠에 관한 역사의 책을 닫을 시간입니다...

records.english:
Yes...
This will be our final battle!
And we shall win it, no matter
the cost!
records.machine_korean_reference: 그래... / 이것이 우리의 마지막 전투가 될 것이다! / 그리고 우리는 어떤 대가를 치르더라도 승리할 것입니다!

records.english:
Alhazard is in the
castle's basement, perhaps
in an underground temple.
records.machine_korean_reference: Alhazard는 / 성의 지하에, 아마도 / 지하 사원에 있습니다.

records.english:
Come on.
Let's finish this.

Let's end this!
The Age of Darkness is over!

Don't fret if it seems
like you're about to succumb.
It's more fun for me that way.
records.machine_korean_reference: 당신이 곧 굴복할 것 같더라도 걱정하지 마세요. / 난 그게 더 재미있어.

records.english:
You finally made it,
thanks to Langrisser.
That's not true!

We got this far through
our faith and dedication. We
merely borrowed Langrisser's
strength.
records.machine_korean_reference: 우리는 여기까지 왔습니다 / 우리의 믿음과 헌신을 통해. 우리는 / 단지 Langrisser의 / 힘을 빌린 것뿐이다.

records.english:
That's right!
It was the power of Light!

How could a man of
your caliber not realize that,
!?
records.machine_korean_reference: 어떻게 당신의 능력을 갖춘 사람이 그것을 깨닫지 못할 수 있겠습니까, / !?

records.english:
Ridiculous! I have
achieved everything through
force.
If one is mighty, wealth and
power are yours for the taking.
Those without power are nothing.
Yes... that is the world we live
in.
I have the means... and I have
Alhazard as well!
records.machine_korean_reference: 말도 안돼! 나는 모든 것을 얻었습니다 / 모든 것을 / 힘으로 성취했습니다. / 누군가가 강하다면, 부와 / 권력은 당신의 것입니다. / 힘이 없는 사람은 아무것도 아니다. / 네... 그게 우리가 사는 세상이에요 / 살고 있어요 / 나에겐 수단이 있고... 그리고 나에겐 / 알하자드도 있어요!

records.english:
You are consumed
by greed, .

Bwahahaha...
You are like yelping dogs!
Once I snatch Langrisser from
your hands, nothing will be
able to stop me!
Rise, servants of Darkness!
records.machine_korean_reference: ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ... / 짖는 개 같으니라고! / 내가 Langrisser를 당신 손에서 빼앗으면, 그 무엇도 나를 막을 수 없을 것입니다! / 일어나라, 어둠의 하수인들이여!

records.english:
I swear upon the Sword
of Light: We shall not lose!
records.machine_korean_reference: 나는 빛의 검에 맹세합니다: 우리는 지지 않을 것입니다!

records.english:
W-Wait! I won't let you
lay one finger on his Majesty!
records.machine_korean_reference: W-잠깐! 나는 당신이 / 폐하에게 손가락 하나를 얹는 것을 허락하지 않을 것입니다!

records.english:
Stop, .
Do not throw your life
away for nothing.
records.machine_korean_reference: 그만해, . / 당신의 인생을 버리지 마십시오 / 헛되이 버리지 마십시오.

records.english:
No! I am the leader of the
Blue Dragon Knights division of
the Rayguard Imperial Army! Let
me fulfill my duties until the
very end!
records.machine_korean_reference: 안돼! 나는 / 레이가드 제국군 / 청룡기사단의 리더이다! / 내가 끝까지 / 내 의무를 다하게 해주세요!

records.english:
...
I thank you for your devotion.
Sir!

Uniting the continent
through force is the surest way
to bring about peace!
If one is weak, wealth and power
cannot be achieved, and the end
result will be betrayal.
Only one of the mightiest can
rule - that is what this world
needs!
records.machine_korean_reference: 대륙을 통합하는 / 무력을 통한 것이 가장 확실한 방법이다 / 평화를 가져오는 것! / 약하면 부와 권력을 / 이룰 수 없고, 그 끝 / 결과는 배신이 될 것이다. / 가장 강력한 자 중 오직 한 사람만이 / 통치할 수 있습니다. 그것이 바로 이 세상이 / 필요로 하는 것입니다!

records.english:
It's over!
Your ambitions are finished!

How amusing.
Go ahead and try!

I came all this way...
...only to be defeated...
Damn...

! You STILL want
to keep fighting?! Don't you
see how senseless it is by now?!
records.machine_korean_reference: ! 당신은 아직도 / 계속 싸우고 싶어?! 지금쯤이면 그게 얼마나 무의미한지 모르시나요?!

records.english:
I already told you!
I will fight to the end!
records.machine_korean_reference: 나는 이미 당신에게 말했다! / 나는 끝까지 싸울 것이다!

records.english: I'll finish you off!

I'm sorry everyone...
It's over for me...

Prepare yourself,
!

This is horrible!
Why did I have to lose NOW...
records.machine_korean_reference: 정말 끔찍해요! / 왜 지금은 져야만 했을까...

records.english:
Ugh, damn it...
This is as far as I go...

You may be strong,
but I shall defeat you!
records.machine_korean_reference: 당신은 강할지 모르지만, / 하지만 내가 당신을 물리칠 것입니다!

records.english:
This is it!
The final chapter in the history
of the Empire ends here!
records.machine_korean_reference: 이것이다! / 역사의 마지막 장은 / 제국의 여기서 끝난다!

records.english:
I wouldn't be so sure
about that. I doubt one such as
yourself can beat me.
records.machine_korean_reference: 나는 확신할 수 없을 것이다 / 그것에 대해. 나는 당신과 같은 사람이 나를 이길 수 있을지 의심스럽습니다.

records.english:
Damn...
Was I unprepared...?

Not that I have a grudge
against you or anything, but
you're going to die here!
records.machine_korean_reference: 내가 원한을 갖고 있다는 것은 아닙니다 / 당신에 대해 또는 다른 것에 대해 / 하지만 / 당신은 여기서 죽을 것입니다!

records.english:
Sorry...
I was defeated...

Alhazard must not be
reawakened... We will seal it
away once more!
records.machine_korean_reference: Alhazard는 다시 깨어나서는 안 됩니다... 다시 한 번 봉인하겠습니다!

records.english:
You'll have to defeat
me first!
records.machine_korean_reference: 당신은 패배해야 할 것입니다 / 나를 먼저!

records.english:
I'm sorry...
I must withdraw for now.

... If you insist on
fighting, then I will have to
defeat you...
records.machine_korean_reference: ... 당신이 고집한다면 / 싸우면, 나는 반드시 / 당신을 패배시켜야 할 것입니다...

records.english:
...It pains me greatly as
well, but that is the law of the
battlefield - even relatives may
have to cross swords in a war.
records.machine_korean_reference: ...그것은 나에게도 매우 고통스럽습니다. 그러나 그것이 / 전쟁터의 법칙입니다. 심지어 친척들조차도 전쟁에서 칼을 맞대야 할 수도 있습니다.

records.english:
Come on!
Hand over Alhazard!

Aieeee!
I mustn't be defeated here...

This is the final
conflict between Light and
Darkness...
We shall soon prevail!
records.machine_korean_reference: 이것이 마지막 / 빛과 / 어둠 사이의 갈등이다... / 우리가 곧 승리할 것이다!

records.english: Ahhh... the blue sky...

Let's go!
Let's finish this war!
Argh... can't...
Let's go, !

, that's enough!
There's no reason to give up
everything for the Empire any
more!
records.machine_korean_reference: , 그거면 충분해! / 포기할 이유가 없습니다 / 제국을 위해 모든 것을 / 더 이상!

records.english:
A man cannot abandon his
duty so easily!
And it's not the Empire that I
serve... I have cast my lot with
His Majesty!
records.machine_korean_reference: 사람은 자신의 의무를 그렇게 쉽게 포기할 수 없습니다! / 그리고 내가 / 봉사하는 것은 제국이 아닙니다... 나는 운명을 걸었습니다 / 폐하!

records.english:
Please stop...!
This is crazy!

Of course it is!!
Yet I cannot stand idly by. I
swore to fight for His Highness
as long as this body is capable
of movement... until the very
end.
And I will abide by my oath
as a Knight.
records.machine_korean_reference: 물론이죠!! / 그럼에도 가만히 있을 수는 없다. 나는 / 전하를 위해 싸울 것을 맹세했습니다 / 이 몸이 능력이 있는 한 / 움직일 수 있는 한... 바로 / 끝까지. / 그리고 나는 내 맹세를 지키겠습니다 / 기사로서.

records.english: Urgh...!

!
Any more fighting is pointless!

Do you pity me?!?
I can still kill you!!
records.machine_korean_reference: 나를 불쌍히 여기시나요?!? / 난 아직 널 죽일 수 있어!!

records.english:
Let it go. You lack
the strength to keep fighting.
records.machine_korean_reference: 놔두세요. 당신은 부족합니다 / 계속 싸울 힘이 있습니다.

records.english:
You've performed
admirably, .
That's enough. Stand down.
records.machine_korean_reference: 당신은 수행했습니다 / 훌륭하게, . / 그거면 충분해요. 물러서세요.

records.english:
...
Sir!

Don't get cocky even
though you've beaten .
I will not be defeated...
The Empire will not fall...
And you cannot take Alhazard
from me.
You've fought with everything
you've got in order to defeat
me, but in the end, I shall be
victorious.
records.machine_korean_reference: 비록 당신이 이겼더라도 자만하지 마세요. / 나는 패배하지 않을 것이다... / 제국은 무너지지 않을 것이다... / 그리고 당신은 알하자드를 빼앗을 수 없다 / 나에게서. / 당신은 나를 패배시키기 위해 / 당신이 가진 모든 것을 가지고 싸웠습니다 / 나를 패배시키려고 하지만 결국에는 내가 승리할 것입니다 / 승리할 것입니다.

records.english:
No... we will win this
battle! We've already won!
records.machine_korean_reference: 아니... 우리는 이 전투에서 승리할 것이다! 우리는 이미 승리했습니다!

records.english:
Long live
Rayguard!
Aieeee!
Uuuh... I...
No... more...

I must return
the favor for the other day.
records.machine_korean_reference: 나는 답례해야 합니다 / 지난 날에 대한 호의를

records.english:
I... an immortal
king... am perishing?!
Graaaargh!!
Grrrr!
Graaa!
Gwoooh!
Your Majesty!

Urgh...
That was magnificent... Just as
I expected of Langrisser...

No! You were defeated
by our combined strength, not
Langrisser!
records.machine_korean_reference: 안돼! 당신은 패배했습니다 / 우리의 힘을 합쳐서 / 랑그릿사가 아닙니다!

records.english:
That IS the power of
Langrisser.
One person's heart alone is
weak. It breeds jealousy,
distrust, bitterness, and
betrayal...
And together, men's hearts bring
forth petty conflicts. Because
of humanity, such conflicts will
never cease. I realized this as
a soldier.
And so I thought to myself...
...if someone, anyone, could
rule the world... if there was
a ruler with absolute power...
war could be eliminated.
That is why I desired the kind
of power that would overwhelm
anything.
records.machine_korean_reference: 그것이 / 랑그릿사의 힘이다. / 한 사람의 마음만으로도 / 약하다. 그것은 질투, / 불신, 비통함, 그리고 / 배신을 낳는다... / 그리고 함께, 남자의 마음은 가져옵니다 / 사소한 갈등을 낳습니다. 때문에 / 인류 때문에, 그러한 갈등은 / 결코 멈추지 않을 것입니다. 나는 이것을 / 군인으로서 깨달았습니다. / 그래서 나는 속으로 생각했다... / ...누군가, 누구든지 / 세상을 지배할 수 있다면... 존재한다면 / 절대 권력을 가진 통치자가 있다면... / 전쟁은 사라질 수 있다. / 그래서 나는 그런 것을 원했다 / 압도할 수 있는 힘을 / 무엇이든.

records.english:
But the method I
chose, ruling through force,
cannot bring true peace.
Heh... Perhaps I was one of the
weak after all... one of those
who don't believe in others.
records.machine_korean_reference: 그러나 내가 선택한 방법은 / 무력으로 통치하는 / 진정한 평화를 가져올 수 없습니다. / 에... 아마도 나는 / 결국... 그 중 / 남을 믿지 않는 사람 중 하나였을 것이다.

records.english:
Emperor, the battle
is over now. For the sake of
the continent's people, let's -
records.machine_korean_reference: 황제님, 전투는 / 이제 끝났습니다. 위해 / 대륙의 사람들을 위해, 하자 -

records.english:
Desist! Though I have
admitted defeat, I am still the
Emperor of Rayguard!
I will not die by your sword!
I shall choose my own death!
Alhazard! Give me the last of
your strength!
records.machine_korean_reference: 그만둬라! 나는 / 패배를 인정했지만, 여전히 / 레이가드의 황제이다! / 나는 당신의 칼에 죽지 않을 것입니다! / 나는 스스로 죽음을 선택하겠다! / 알하자드! 나에게 마지막 힘을 주세요 / 당신의 힘을!

records.english:
Ahhhh!
The sword's demonic power is out
of control!
records.machine_korean_reference: 아아아! / 검의 악마의 힘이 통제 불능입니다!

records.english:
Ahhhh!! That sword's
power is out of control!

Your Majesty!
I will join you!

... , this is not
your time to die. You will live
to see the end of the Empire!
records.machine_korean_reference: ... , 지금은 아닙니다 / 당신이 죽을 시간이 아닙니다. 당신은 살게 될 것이다 / 제국의 종말을 보기 위해!

records.english:
What meaning could there
be in living on after Your
Majesty's death.
Your dream was my dream. I've
served and followed you all this
time. I want to follow my dream
till the very end...
Your Highness! Please allow me
to accompany you to the last!
records.machine_korean_reference: 폐하의 죽음 이후에 살아가는 것이 무슨 의미가 있겠습니까? / 너의 꿈은 나의 꿈이었다. 나는 지금까지 / 당신을 섬기고 따랐습니다. 나는 내 꿈을 따르고 싶습니다 / 끝까지... / 전하! 제가 마지막까지 당신과 동행할 수 있도록 허락해주세요!

records.english:
Pfff...
Do as you wish.

... everyone...
I can die in peace knowing that
the continent is in your hands.
That is my last request...
Farewell!
records.machine_korean_reference: ... 여러분... / 나는 편히 죽을 수 있습니다 / 대륙이 당신의 손에 있다는 것을 알기에. / 그게 내 마지막 부탁이야... / 안녕!

records.english:
... I'm sorry...
I want to die while chasing
after the dream I believed in...
records.machine_korean_reference: ... 미안해... / 쫓다 죽고 싶어 / 믿었던 꿈을 쫓아서...

records.english:
... I'll go too...
...together with you...
Sister!

...
...I can't respond to
your feelings for me...
Sorry for being...
...such an inept man...
Thank you... ...
records.machine_korean_reference: ... / ...대답할 수가 없어요 / 나에 대한 당신의 마음... / 미안해요... / ...너무 무능한 남자라서... / 고마워요... ...

records.english: Leeeeeoooooonnnn!!

All that's left after
this long war is Alhazard...
How sad...
records.machine_korean_reference: / 이 기나긴 전쟁 끝에 남은 건 알하자드 뿐... / 얼마나 슬픈 일인지...

records.english:
Must those who would be
kings and emperors do whatever
necessary to achieve power?
records.machine_korean_reference: 되고자 하는 자들은 / 왕과 황제가 되어야만 합니다 / 권력을 획득하기 위해 필요한 것은 무엇이든 해야 합니까?

records.english:
Must those who would be
kings and emperors do whatever
necessary to achieve power?
records.machine_korean_reference: 되고자 하는 자들은 / 왕과 황제가 되어야만 합니다 / 권력을 획득하기 위해 필요한 것은 무엇이든 해야 합니까?

records.english:
That might be true,
but the power of Darkness must
never be used for that purpose.
Darkness is the enemy of
humanity...
records.machine_korean_reference: 그것이 사실일 수도 있지만, / 그러나 어둠의 힘은 절대로 사용되어서는 안 됩니다 / 결코 그런 목적으로. / 어둠은 / 인류의 적이다...

records.english:
Perhaps Alhazard was
born out of people's desires.
records.machine_korean_reference: 아마도 Alhazard는 사람들의 욕망에서 태어났을 것입니다.

records.english: Maybe so.
The battle is over now.
*Grunt!*
Hey, bro! BEA-U-TI-FUL!
What's with these guys!?

Oh, are you gentlemen
training?

Oh... yes.
I too am constantly improving my
body. But I won't lose to whelps
like you when it comes to body
building!
records.machine_korean_reference: 아... 네. / 나도 끊임없이 내 / 몸을 개선하고 있다. 하지만 신체/건물에 관한 한 나는 당신 같은 새끼들에게 지지 않을 거예요!

records.english:
*GRUNT!*
This is what a real man looks
like!

Damn you!!
But this pose'll kill you!
Urgh!
records.machine_korean_reference: 젠장!! / 하지만 이 포즈는 죽여버릴 거야! / 으윽!

records.english: "Nice Pose Death"!

Huh!? Will you stop
with this silliness, already?
records.machine_korean_reference: 응!? 당신은 그만둘 건가요 / 이 어리석은 짓을, 벌써?

records.english:
What!? Those who make fun
of our muscles will be punished!
records.machine_korean_reference: 뭐!? 놀리는 사람들은 / 우리 근육을 비난할 것이다!

records.english:
That's right!
Let's show [em, , !
Alright!
What in the world...?

Tonight is OUR night!
, , we'll KO our foes
with our poses!
Others have perished before us,
and they'll be no different!
Let's go for it, guys!
*GRUNT!*
records.machine_korean_reference: 오늘 밤은 우리의 밤입니다! / , , 우리는 적을 KO시킬 것이다 / 우리의 포즈로! / 다른 사람들도 우리보다 먼저 죽었고 / 그들도 다르지 않을 거예요! / 가자 얘들아! / *그런 소리!*

records.english:
Gotta get my body into
shape!

We can't let them unite!
...Huh?
Where did that come from?
records.machine_korean_reference: 우리는 그들이 단결하게 놔둘 수 없습니다! / ...응? / 그건 어디서 나온 거야?

records.english:
Surely it was a divine
revelation!
Let's train our bodies together!
records.machine_korean_reference: 확실히 그것은 신성한/계시였습니다! / 함께 몸을 단련하자!

records.english:
That must have been divine
guidance!
Come, let us sweat as one!
records.machine_korean_reference: 그것은 신성한/인도였음에 틀림없어요! / 자, 우리 하나 되어 땀 흘리자!

records.english:
We can't let them join
together!
...?
Why did I just say that?
records.machine_korean_reference: 우리는 그들이 합류하게 할 수 없습니다! / ...? / 내가 왜 그런 말을 했지?

records.english:
Surely it was a divine
revelation!
Now let's get that nice body
of yours into even better shape!
records.machine_korean_reference: 확실히 그것은 신성한/계시였습니다! / 이제 그 멋진 몸매를 만들어 봅시다 / 당신의 몸매를 더 좋게 만드세요!

records.english:
Bro-ther! Bro-ther!
My brothers and me!
Bro-ther! Bro-ther!
records.machine_korean_reference: 형제님! 형제! / 형제들과 나! / 형제! 형제!

records.english:
Body building!!
...That's odd... I didn't intend
to say that just now...
records.machine_korean_reference: 바디빌딩!! / ...이상하네요... 지금은 그런 말을 할 생각이 없었습니다...

records.english:
That was a commandment
from Idaten and Benten, the gods
of our Brotherly Love sect.
records.machine_korean_reference: 그것은 계명이었습니다 / 신들인 Idaten과 Benten으로부터 / 우리 형제애 종파의.

records.english:
I too have seen
the light!

Ah, , you've become
a brother now too!
B-Brother!
Brother!
Brother!
Hooray!

Body building!
...Huh??

Hey, . We didn't
really have to come here, did
we?
records.machine_korean_reference: 안녕, . 우리는 / 정말로 여기에 올 필요가 없었어요, 그렇죠 / 우리는?

records.english:
Yeah we did...
...because... umm...
...maybe 's here.
records.machine_korean_reference: 응, 그랬지... / ...왜냐면... 음... / ...아마 여기 있을 것 같아.

records.english:
Uh...
I don't think so.

How's this!?
NNNAAAGGGHHH!!!
I don't feel so good...

Hey you, little boy!
Get that body into shape!
Drop down and give me twenty!
Then do fifteen sit-ups!
And run up to the 29th floor!
records.machine_korean_reference: 안녕, 꼬마야! / 몸매를 가꾸세요! / 내려서 20개 주세요! / 그럼 윗몸 일으키기 15개를 해보세요! / 그리고 29층까지 달려가세요!

records.english:
...?
I don't know what they're
talking about.
records.machine_korean_reference: ...? / 나는 그들이 무슨 말을 하는지 모르겠다 / 무슨 말을 하는지

records.english:
Pfff, a real man would be
able to understand that sort of
thing!
records.machine_korean_reference: 맙소사, 진짜 남자라면 그런 종류의 일을 이해할 수 있을 텐데!

records.english: Three!
Two!

Everyone be careful!
They might be preparing to use
some sort of magic on us!
records.machine_korean_reference: 다들 조심하세요! / 그들은 사용할 준비를 하고 있을지도 모릅니다 / 우리에게 일종의 마법을!

records.english: One!

!
It's some sort of countdown!

...!
I remember now!
It's the ]Man Beam", a spell
from another dimension.
It is said that it was brought
into this world long ago by

outside_event_blocks.english:
Oh... Welcome, .
Thanks to the experiences I had
during the war, something inside
me has changed. My father is
also delighted in my newfound
strength.
Unfortunately, he's not here
right now, but he asked me to
convey his gratitude to you.
From now on, my father and I
will work as hard as possible
for the people of Salrath.
Thanks for all you've done.
outside_event_blocks.machine_korean_reference: 아... 환영합니다. / 내가 가졌던 경험들 덕분에 / 전쟁 중에 / 내 안의 뭔가가 바뀌었다. 나의 아버지는 / 또한 나의 새로 발견된 / 힘을 기뻐하십니다. / 불행하게도 그는 여기에 없습니다 / 지금은, 그러나 그는 나에게 요청했습니다 / 당신에게 감사의 마음을 전하십시오. / 이제부터 아버지와 나는 / 가능한 한 열심히 일할 것이다 / Salrath 사람들을 위해. / 당신이 한 모든 일에 감사드립니다.

outside_event_blocks.english:
Oh... Welcome, .
I wasn't much of a hero during
the war, but at least I was able
to make it back safely.
My father keeps yelling at me to
train, but luckily he's away at
the moment, so it's nice and
quiet in the mansion.
It seems I'll have to go on
another journey because my
father ordered me to.
If we meet during our travels,
I'm sure I'll wind up in your
debt again.
outside_event_blocks.machine_korean_reference: 아... 환영합니다. / 나는 전쟁 동안 그다지 영웅은 아니었지만, 적어도 나는 할 수 있었다 / 무사히 돌아올 수 있었다. / 나의 아버지는 계속 나에게 훈련하라고 소리치지만, 운 좋게도 아버지는 지금 자리에 계시지 않아서 저택 안은 조용하고 좋다. / 나는 떠나야 할 것 같다 / 나의 / 아버지가 나에게 명령했기 때문에 / 또 다른 여행을 떠나야 할 것 같다. / 만약 우리가 여행 중에 만나면 / 나는 당신에게 다시 빚을 지게 될 것이라고 확신합니다.

Oh! ! You came!

castle's soldiers are out?
The truth is, being calm and
patient like this doesn't fit
my personality, but now that
the entire castle is empty...
...Hmm, yeah, I guess I'll go on
a journey. I'm not the type of
person who likes to sit still
for very long... just like you,
!
Since everybody else is trying
their hardest, you need to do
your best too!
Oh yeah, we'll be able to see
each other again someday, right?

...

is inside, so I'll go

outside_event_blocks.english:
It's been a long time,
hasn't it, . A year has
already passed since the war...
Time really flies, doesn't it.
Thanks to you, the endless
struggle between Light and
Darkness has finally come
to an end.
I guess was testing us,
the Descendants of Light.
Lately I've been thinking that
if I had been able to surpass my
limitations, maybe we could have
destroyed the Darkness...
I sometimes wonder if Alhazard
was created as a common enemy
to help unite people...
Hee hee hee... I'm overanalyzing
aren't I. But regardless, it was
thanks to you that peace has now
returned to the world.
I've finally been relieved of my
duty to guide the Descendants of
Light, so I think I'll just live
life as an ordinary woman now.
Thank you so much for
everything...

... Thanks for

... You've come
back...! This whole time I've
been taking care of the orphans,
I've been waiting for you to
return...
: Oh really... Well I'm
afraid I can't stay long; I'm on
another journey. I promised
and the rest that I'd work to
build a peaceful world.
: ...Can I...
...Can I come with you?
: Huh?!
: Wherever you go...
...take me with you!
: ...
: I won't trouble you...
Or would a girl like me be a
burden on you?
: That's not it at all!
It's because you're so important
to me that I don't want to put
you in danger!
: I appreciate that,
, but...
...But I don't want to be alone
anymore!!
I want to live with the one
I believe in... the one I love!
Please, , let me be with
you!
: You're not alone,
...
You're not alone anymore...

outside_event_blocks.english:
's reputation spread as an
outstanding warrior who could
survive without losing his cool
even in difficult situations.
After returning to the castle,
he would constantly protect it
during the many absences of the
princess.
He also worked night and day
with the other soldiers to
rebuild the damaged towns,
and so Kalzath soon began to
return to its former glory.
Afterwards, in order to make the
world safer, he led an offensive
to rid the land of the remaining
monsters.
One day he rescued a beautiful
woman who was being attacked
by a monster, and they fell
in love.
After the monster eradication
operation ended, the two of
them were married.

outside_event_blocks.english:
, who had lived through
countless battles, became
well-known as a warrior of
Kalzath.
After returning to the castle,
he would constantly protect it
during the many absences of the
princess.
He also worked night and day
with the other soldiers to
rebuild the damaged towns,
and so Kalzath soon began to
return to its former glory.
Afterwards, in order to make the
world safer, he led an offensive
to rid the land of the remaining
monsters.
One day he rescued a beautiful
woman who was being attacked
by a monster; they fell in love
and soon got married.
Within several years, nearly all
the monsters within the kingdom
of Kalzath had been eradicated,
thanks to the energetic .

outside_event_blocks.english:
Having survived many battles, he
was considered such an excellent
warrior that none of the knights
of Kalzath in all its history
could compare to him.
After returning to the castle,
he would constantly protect it
during the many absences of the
princess.
He also worked night and day
with the other soldiers to
rebuild the damaged towns,
and Kalzath soon exceeded
its former glory.
Afterwards, in order to make the
world safer, he led an offensive
to rid the land of the remaining
monsters.
One day he rescued a village
under attack by monsters and met
a beautiful woman living there.
The two came to love each other
and eventually married.
Many years later, thanks to
's energetic work, nearly
all of the monsters on the
continent had been wiped out.

He also worked night and day

outside_event_blocks.english:
They were expected to be the
finest flying unit in the
continent, but they ended up
being ridiculed as cowards.
After returning to the castle,
he would constantly protect it
during the many absences of the
princess.
He also worked night and day
with other soldiers to rebuild
the damaged towns, but despite
his best efforts, things did
not improve much.
Afterwards, in order to make the
world safer, he led an offensive
to rid the land of the remaining
monsters.
However, his strategies having
done nothing but backfire, the
end result was a net loss.
One day he attempted to rescue
a beautiful woman who was being
chased by monsters, but wound
up losing his own life in the
process.

They were expected to be the

After returning to town,
put in all his effort to help

It is said that, ashamed of his
lack of ability, began
wandering by himself.

outside_event_blocks.english:
Judging from the fact that she
said farewell to with
a glint of envy in her eyes, her
exploits on the battlefield must
not have been enough for her.
She only remained settled down
for a number of days before
quietly escaping from under
the watchful gaze of .
Presently, a hastily organized
search party is pursuing her
whereabouts; but , being
as willful as she is, is not
likely to be captured so easily.
On occasion, one will hear
rumors about a strong female
fighter, presumably .
One of these days she will
likely give up her aimless
journey and suddenly return.

outside_event_blocks.english:
Content with her success on
the battlefield, docilely
remained in Kalzath Castle for
a while.
But within only a few days, she
quietly escaped from under the
watchful gaze of and fled.
A hastily organized search party
was pursuing her whereabouts;
but , being as willful as
she was, was not likely to be
captured so easily.
A short time later, a rumor
emerged about a female fighter
who had defeated a great dragon
single-handedly, and she was
discovered by the search party.
Now is quietly residing
in the castle, but with
not knowing if she'll escape
again sometime, her guardian's
hardships do not cease.

outside_event_blocks.english:
As she seemed content with her
performance on the battlefield,
everybody expected that
would start behaving herself,
but that notion quickly died.
She initially cooperated,
but several days later
unexpectedly fled the castle
in secret.
She had heard a rumor about a
demon lord invading a kingdom,
so she challenged it to a fight
in order to test her skills.
After three days and three
nights of intense fighting,
she finally defeated the demon
lord and was declared to be a
supreme warrior.
The rightful king offered his
throne to her, but she said
that no matter how much wealth
and power she obtained, it was
all meaningless to her.
Completely satisfied by earning
the prestige of a warrior, she
returned to her castle shortly
thereafter and has served her
kingdom ever since.
outside_event_blocks.machine_korean_reference: 그녀가 만족해 보였기 때문에 / 전장에서의 성과 / 모두가 기대했다 / 스스로 행동하기 시작할 것이지만 / 그 생각은 금방 사라졌다. / 그녀는 처음에는 협조했지만 / 며칠 후 / 예기치 않게 성에서 도망쳤다 / 비밀리에. / 그녀는 왕국을 침략하는 / 마왕에 대한 소문을 들었다 / 그래서 그녀는 그 왕국에 싸움에 도전했다 / 자신의 실력을 시험하기 위해. / 사흘 낮과 사흘 밤의 / 치열한 싸움 끝에 / 그녀는 마침내 마왕을 물리치고 / 최고의 전사로 선포되었습니다. / 정당한 왕은 자신의 / 왕좌를 그녀에게 제안했지만, 그녀는 말했다 / 아무리 많은 부와 / 그녀가 얻은 권력이라 할지라도, 그것은 / 그녀에게 모두 의미가 없었다. / 획득함으로써 완전히 만족했다 / 전사의 명성을 얻은 그녀는 / 그녀의 성으로 곧 돌아와서 / 그 이후로 그녀를 섬겼다 / 그 이후로 왕국.

outside_event_blocks.english:
Having neither experienced a
single defeat nor accomplished
any great victories in the war,
she secretly fled the castle
within only a few days.
In 's room was found a
letter; it said that she went
to train in order to become
stronger.
Presently, a hastily organized
search party is pursuing her
whereabouts; but , being
as willful as she is, is not
likely to be captured so easily.
Since then, no rumors or other
information about her have been
forthcoming. All we can do now
is pray that she will return
safely.
outside_event_blocks.machine_korean_reference: 한 번도 패배하지 않았고, 달성하지도 못했습니다 / 전쟁에서 어떤 큰 승리도 거두지 못한 채, / 그녀는 몰래 성에서 도망쳤습니다 / 단 며칠 만에. / 의 방에서 / 편지가 발견되었습니다. 그것은 그녀가 갔다고 말했다 / 훈련하러 갔다 / 더 강해지려고. / 현재, 급히 조직된 / 수색대가 그녀를 추적하고 있다 / 그녀의 소재를; 그러나 그녀만큼 고의적이라는 것은 그렇게 쉽게 포착될 가능성이 없다. 그 이후로 그녀에 관한 어떤 소문이나 기타 정보도 나오지 않았습니다. 지금 우리가 할 수 있는 일은 / 그녀가 돌아올 수 있도록 기도하는 것뿐입니다 / 무사히.

, greatly distraught over

All we can do now is hope that
she will return without being
seriously injured.

outside_event_blocks.english:
Unable to forget her single loss
in battle, despite many great
exploits, she fled the castle
in pursuit of within
days of parting with him.
In 's room was found a
letter; it said that she went
to train in order to become
stronger. A search party was
hastily formed to pursue her.
A short time later, a rumor
emerged about a female fighter
who had defeated a great dragon
single-handedly, and she was
discovered by the search party.
Since her wounds have not yet
healed, is being well
behaved for the moment, but
will probably escape from the
castle again soon enough.

outside_event_blocks.english:
Probably because she had done
little good during the war,
fell into depression.
Having completely lost her
confidence, she went to see
in order to begin her
study of the sword anew.
But without having pursued it
for very long, she quietly left
on a journey.
A hastily formed search party
was sent after her, but they
have not found her yet.
Rumors later spread about a
female fighter who recklessly
challenged a dragon by herself
and was defeated.
It has not yet been confirmed
whether or not the woman in
question was .

outside_event_blocks.english:
, having suffered more
defeats than she had expected,
seemed depressed for a time.
But thanks to her inherently
cheerful personality, she soon
got over it and fled the castle
in order to polish her skills.
A hastily formed search party
was sent to pursue her, but
they have not found her yet.
Rumors later surfaced of a
female fighter who recklessly
challenged a vampire lord to
battle and has been missing
ever since.
However, nobody knows if the
missing woman was or not.

outside_event_blocks.english:
, having suffered more
defeats than she had expected,
seemed depressed for a time.
But thanks to her inherently
cheerful personality and the
consolation of her many great
victories, she soon returned
to her normal self.
Resolved to study defensive
tactics, she left the castle
on a journey; but lacking the
patience for such techniques,
she soon abandoned them.
She later succeeded in defeating
a great dragon, but returned to
the castle gravely injured.
She miraculously survived, but
having not learned her lesson
yet, she is biding her time for
the chance to escape the castle
again.

outside_event_blocks.english:
, the Prince of Darkness,
had tried countless times to
ensnare the world in a ruinous
cataclysm.
With the manipulation of Emperor
, his plans appeared to
be succeeding but were stopped
just before completion.
Ironically, his loss had
not been at the hands of the
Descendants of Light but rather
and the evil sword
Alhazard.
The flesh and soul of his
immortal body became the power
of Darkness and were absorbed
by Alhazard, which was then
vanquished from this world.
With his death the threat of
Darkness lifted, but as long as
this conflict is remembered in
legend, , the Prince of
Darkness, will live on.

outside_event_blocks.english:
The brave General , head
of the Fire Dragon Army, had
stood in the way of
and the others countless times.
He was a big threat due to his
expert tactics refined through
actual battlefield experience.
His last conflict was the land
battle within the town of Lunam.
It was the clash with
in which used the Flame
Dragons to buy time to
abscond with .
Leaving Eliza, who was near
childbirth, rushed into
the battlefield when the Flame
Dragon Army was exposed to
danger.
To rescue his men,
disregarded his own safety and
threw himself into the frenzy of
battle. His life was cut short
at the hand of .
In the present age, in which the
conflict over the two swords has
long ended, his name is only
remembered by history.

, general of the Empire's
Ice Dragon Navy, had feigned
having a personality that was
the exact opposite of .
Her cool-headed and cruel
disposition, which did not match
her gorgeous appearance, greatly
magnified the fear of her within
the Imperial armies.
However, while setting sail to
return to Emperor 's
castle, she was attacked by
and the others.
As the fighting had begun much
earlier than she anticipated,
her reinforcements did not make
it in time, and her life came to
an end by 's blow.
With her death, the morale of
the surviving members of the
Ice Dragon Navy vanished, and
the unit collapsed.

outside_event_blocks.english:
's life changed forever
after meeting , who
possessed immense strength and
the charisma to charm people.
They both dreamed of a peaceful,
unified continent, and so he bet
everything on the man who would
be Emperor.
Although young, , who had
both ingenuity and unusual skill
with the sword, was appointed
the commander of the glorious
Blue Dragon Knights.
He was popular among his troops
for his good character, and his
deeds of valor and undefeated
combat record won him the trust
of the Emperor.
However, the Empire, its plans
crushed by the resistance of
's group, began to fall
into decline.
In a battle to the death with
, was unable to
defeat him and his comrades
of surpassing skill.
Then, knowing that it was the
end for the Empire, he chose the
same fate as the Emperor he had
believed in.

outside_event_blocks.english:
The Great Wizard . He led
the Black Dragon Sorcerers, and
secretly supported the Rayguard
Empire while pretending to serve
.
's real strength was his
immense magical power, said to
be the best on the continent,
and his trenchant insights;
he excelled even in politics.
As staff officer of the Emperor,
he had complete control. This
too was a task well suited to
his abundant knowledge and
cleverness.
The one who had seen through
's machinations and who had
laid out a brilliant stratagem
was none other than .
He obtained the evil sword
Alhazard and succeeded in
bestowing upon
its unlimited power.
However, he was opposed by the
many allies of , who had
acquired Langrisser.
When they fell into his trap,
showered upon them the
concentrated magic attacks of
the Black Dragon Sorcerers.
But due to a single attack by
, who found a momentary
opening, he died a heroic death.

outside_event_blocks.english:
Emperor , ruler of the
Grand Empire Rayguard, in but a
single generation revived the
kingdom and thereafter conquered
the majority of the continent.
His charisma brought him not
only his four generals but also
a great many superbly-skilled
subordinates. Their performance
always met his expectations.
Having acquired Alhazard by
defeating , the Prince of
Darkness who tried to manipulate
him, then became the
strongest man in the continent.
]Men's hearts are weak, and
those who don't believe in
anyone will hurt others."
Because he recognized human
weaknesses, sought
unification through military
might. But some might consider
that to be a ]reign of terror".
To acquire the strength in which
he could be supreme in any kind
of conflict, the war escalated
and a great deal of innocent
blood was spilt.
But with Langrisser in the
possession of the Descendants of
Light, who joined their hearts
into one, his dream collapsed...
had found himself
in a decisive battle against
within the underground
temple in the innermost depths
of Velzeria Castle.
He suffered heavy, fatal wounds.
When he realized that it was
over for him, with his own hand
the once-mighty Emperor caused
Alhazard to go out of control.
It was as if he had made the
distinction between right and
wrong of the war he started
himself.
Finally, he put an end to his
life, which had been full of
troublesome ups and downs.

outside_event_blocks.english:
With the curtain finally fallen
on the constant conflict over
Langrisser, she was liberated
from the fate of leading the
Descendants of Light.
Returning once again to her
laboratory near Rahl River,
she resumed the study of
magic, which was her hobby.
However, wizards who had heard
rumors about began to
flock to her, and they became
her apprentices.
Before long, the apprentices
began to teach 's magic
in each of their own lands, and
her name was known throughout
the continent.
She then wrote a book which
compiled all her knowledge thus
far. It became very influential
and was regarded as a handbook
for wizards.

outside_event_blocks.english:
With the curtain finally fallen
on the constant conflict over
Langrisser, she was liberated
from the fate of leading the
Descendants of Light.
She rebuilt her laboratory near
Rahl River to allow even more
wizards to do research, and
also opened a school of magic.
Even though it was in a remote
region, in the blink of an eye
countless wizards came to visit.
The lectures given by ,
who possessed a great deal of
long-forgotten knowledge, were
considered priceless by the
magicians.
Over time, wizards throughout
the continent wanted to take
's classes, and she was
unable to handle the volume of
students in her tiny laboratory.
Eventually the school grew to
become the first university of
magic in history.

outside_event_blocks.english:
With the curtain finally fallen
on the constant conflict over
Langrisser, she was liberated
from the fate of leading the
Descendants of Light.
She rebuilt her laboratory near
Rahl River to allow even more
wizards to do research, and
also opened a school of magic.
Even though it was in a remote
region, in the blink of an eye
countless wizards came to visit.
The lectures given by ,
who possessed a great deal of
long-forgotten knowledge, were
considered priceless by the
magicians.
Over time, wizards throughout
the continent wanted to take
's classes, and it soon

university in history.
Nowadays, having been blessed
with excellent apprentices,
they say she spends each day
lazily attending to research.

outside_event_blocks.english:
With the curtain finally fallen
on the constant conflict over
Langrisser, she was liberated
from the fate of leading the
Descendants of Light.
Unable to forget her single
defeat, returned once
more to her laboratory near Rahl
River to acquire more knowledge.
Along with , who had become
her apprentice, she then wrote a
book which compiled the results
of her research.
However, the extremely difficult
contents were too much for most
wizards to comprehend, and only
a few of them took much pleasure
in reading it.
Nowadays she is working on a
revision of the book that is
easier to understand.
outside_event_blocks.machine_korean_reference: 마침내 막을 내리면서 / 랑그릿사를 둘러싼 끊임없는 갈등 속에서, 그녀는 해방되었다 / / 빛의 후예들을 이끄는 운명에서. / 그녀의 단 한 번의 / 패배를 잊을 수 없어, 더 많은 지식을 얻기 위해 Rahl / River 근처의 그녀의 연구실로 한 번 더 돌아왔습니다. / 함께 / 그녀의 견습생이 된 와 함께, 그녀는 썼다 / 결과를 정리한 책 / 그녀의 연구. / 그러나 극도로 어려운 / 내용은 대부분의 / 마법사들이 이해하기에는 너무 많았고, 단지 / 그들 중 소수만이 많은 즐거움을 느꼈다 / 그것을 읽는 데서. 요즘 그녀는 더 이해하기 쉬운 책의 개정판을 작업하고 있습니다.

outside_event_blocks.english:
With the curtain finally fallen
on the constant conflict over
Langrisser, she was liberated
from the fate of leading the
Descendants of Light.
Unable to forget her single
defeat, returned once
more to her laboratory near Rahl
River to acquire more knowledge.
Along with , who had become
her apprentice, she then wrote a
book which compiled the results
of her research.
The easy-to-comprehend writing
and low-level material was well
received by those desiring to be
wizards, and there were many who
sought to learn from her.
They say that now has
many apprentices studying under
her.
outside_event_blocks.machine_korean_reference: 마침내 막을 내리면서 / 랑그릿사를 둘러싼 끊임없는 갈등 속에서, 그녀는 해방되었다 / / 빛의 후예들을 이끄는 운명에서. / 그녀의 단 한 번의 / 패배를 잊을 수 없어, 더 많은 지식을 얻기 위해 Rahl / River 근처의 그녀의 연구실로 한 번 더 돌아왔습니다. / 함께 / 그녀의 견습생이 된 와 함께, 그녀는 썼다 / 결과를 정리한 책 / 그녀의 연구. / 이해하기 쉬운 글과 낮은 수준의 자료는 호평을 받았습니다 / 되고자 하는 사람들에게 / 마법사가 되었고, 많은 사람들이 / 그녀에게서 배우고자 했습니다. 그들은 지금 그녀 밑에서 공부하는 많은 견습생들이 있다고 합니다.

outside_event_blocks.english:
With the curtain finally fallen
on the constant conflict over
Langrisser, she was liberated
from the fate of leading the
Descendants of Light.
Unable to forget her single
defeat, returned once
more to her laboratory near Rahl
River to acquire more knowledge.
She then wrote a book which
compiled the results of her
research, which soon became
the standard for magicians
everywhere.
As a result, 's name
spread throughout the land,
and those who wish to study
under her directly arrive
constantly, even now.
Although small, her rebuilt
laboratory is known today as
the Rahl River School of Magic.
outside_event_blocks.machine_korean_reference: 마침내 막을 내리면서 / 랑그릿사를 둘러싼 끊임없는 갈등 속에서, 그녀는 해방되었다 / / 빛의 후예들을 이끄는 운명에서. / 그녀의 단 한 번의 / 패배를 잊을 수 없어, 더 많은 지식을 얻기 위해 Rahl / River 근처의 그녀의 연구실로 한 번 더 돌아왔습니다. 그런 다음 그녀는 책을 썼다 / 그녀의 연구 결과를 정리한 / 그것은 곧 되었다 / 마술사들을 위한 / 모든 곳의 표준이 되었다. / 그 결과, 의 이름은 / 온 땅에 퍼져 / 공부하고 싶은 사람들이 / 그녀 밑에서 직접 찾아온다 / 지금도 끊임없이. / 작지만, 그녀의 재건된 / 실험실은 오늘날로 알려져 있다 / Rahl River 마법 학교

outside_event_blocks.english:
With the curtain finally fallen
on the constant conflict over
Langrisser, she was liberated
from the fate of leading the
Descendants of Light.
Deeply regretting the fact that
she was not very useful during
the war, returned to
her laboratory near Rahl River.
, who had convinced
herself that she was basically
powerless, worked diligently on
her magic research in order to
improve herself.
After , who had come for
magic training, disappeared,
hardly anyone came to visit
her anymore.
As truth fades away into legend,
so too has her name faded from
the memory of history.
outside_event_blocks.machine_korean_reference: 마침내 막을 내리면서 / 랑그릿사를 둘러싼 끊임없는 갈등 속에서, 그녀는 해방되었다 / / 빛의 후예들을 이끄는 운명에서. / 그녀가 전쟁 중에 별로 유용하지 않았다는 사실을 깊이 후회하며, Rahl River 근처에 있는 그녀의 연구실로 돌아왔습니다. / 은(는) 확신했다 / 자신이 근본적으로 / 무력하다고 스스로를 / , 부지런히 일했다 / 자신을 향상시키기 위해 / 그녀의 마법 연구에. / 그 이후로 / 마법 훈련을 받으러 왔던 은(는) 사라졌고 / 거의 누구도 방문하지 않았다 / 더 이상. / 진실이 전설로 사라지듯이 / 그녀의 이름도 사라졌습니다 / 역사의 기억에서.

outside_event_blocks.english:
With the curtain finally fallen
on the constant conflict over
Langrisser, she was liberated
from the fate of leading the
Descendants of Light.
However, having experienced one
defeat after another, futility
was all that remained in her
heart.
Believing that magic only causes
suffering, , who had
embraced doubt, resumed her
research in a new direction
after returning to Rahl River.
Despite long, arduous research,
she felt that no answer would
ever be forthcoming, so she
temporarily departed from this
world with reincarnation magic.
They say that the only thing
that remained in her laboratory
was the book in which she had
detailed all her research up
to the very end.
outside_event_blocks.machine_korean_reference: 마침내 막을 내리면서 / 랑그릿사를 둘러싼 끊임없는 갈등 속에서, 그녀는 해방되었다 / / 빛의 후예들을 이끄는 운명에서. / 그러나, 연이어 패배를 겪은 후, 허무함만이 / 그녀의 마음 속에 남아 있는 전부였습니다. / 마법은 오직 고통만을 야기한다고 믿고 / 의심을 품었던 는 그녀를 재개했다 / 새로운 방향으로의 연구 / Rahl River로 돌아온 후. / 길고 힘든 연구에도 불구하고 / 그녀는 아무 대답도 없을 것이라고 느꼈습니다 / 결코 나오지 않을 것입니다. 그래서 그녀는 / 환생 마법을 가지고 / 일시적으로 이 세상을 떠났습니다. / 그들은 말한다 / 그녀의 연구실에 남아 있는 유일한 것은 / 그녀가 가지고 있던 책뿐이었다 / 그녀의 모든 연구를 / 끝까지 자세히 설명했다.

outside_event_blocks.english:
With the curtain finally fallen
on the constant conflict over
Langrisser, she was liberated
from the fate of leading the
Descendants of Light.
had experienced numerous
crises, but in her own way she
ended up proving the greatness
of magic.
Believing that magic shouldn't
be used just to hurt others, she
resumed her research in a new
direction after returning to her
Rahl River laboratory.
Despite long, arduous research,
she felt that no answer would
ever be forthcoming, but without
realizing it she had done quite
a lot of magic research.
After condensing it all into
a magic book, she vacated the
laboratory and left on a quest
for knowledge to train her mind.
outside_event_blocks.machine_korean_reference: 마침내 막을 내리면서 / 랑그릿사를 둘러싼 끊임없는 갈등 속에서, 그녀는 해방되었다 / / 빛의 후예들을 이끄는 운명에서. / 수많은 경험을 했다 / 위기, 그러나 그녀 자신의 방식으로 그녀는 / 결국 위대함을 증명하게 되었다 / 마법의. / 마법이 단지 다른 사람에게 상처를 주기 위해 사용되어서는 안 된다고 믿고, 그녀는 / 자신의 Rahl River 연구실로 돌아온 후 새로운 방향으로 연구를 재개했습니다. / 길고 힘든 연구에도 불구하고 / 그녀는 어떤 대답도 나오지 않을 것이라고 느꼈습니다 / 결코 나오지 않았지만 / 그것을 깨닫지 못한 채 그녀는 꽤 많은 마법 연구를 해왔습니다. / 모든 것을 압축한 후 / 마법의 책으로, 그녀는 / 연구실을 비우고 탐구를 떠났다 / 그녀의 마음을 단련할 지식을 찾기 위해.

outside_event_blocks.english:
, who had far surpassed his
father's expectations by greatly
maturing, returned to Salrath,
where his parents awaited him.
He later received an invitation
from Kalzath Castle to serve the
head of Kalzath as a knight.
Three years later, a horde of
monsters attacked Salrath, and
the town was driven to the verge
of destruction.
But Salrath made it through
safely, protected by 's
squadron, which had quickly
rushed to the scene.
His courage and gallantry were
highly esteemed, and he was thus
promoted to the famed Imperial
Guard.
outside_event_blocks.machine_korean_reference: 그의 / 아버지의 기대를 훨씬 뛰어넘은 , 크게 성장하여 / Salrath로 돌아왔다 / 그곳에서 그의 부모는 그를 기다리고 있었다. / 그는 나중에 초대를 받았습니다 / Kalzath 성으로부터 / 기사로서 Kalzath의 수장을 섬기라는 / 3년 후, 한 무리의 / 괴물들이 Salrath를 공격했고 / 마을은 위기에 처하게 되었습니다 / 파괴의. 그러나 Salrath는 신속하게 현장으로 돌진한 부대의 보호를 받으며 안전하게 통과했습니다. / 그의 용기와 용감함은 / 매우 높이 평가되었고, 그리하여 그는 / 유명한 황실 근위병으로 승진되었습니다.

outside_event_blocks.english:
, who had far surpassed his
father's expectations by greatly
maturing, returned to Salrath,
where his parents awaited him.
He received invitations from
several kingdoms to be their
knight captain, but ,
who still felt inexperienced,
politely declined their offers.
Three years later, a horde of
monsters attacked Salrath, but
the squadron swiftly raised by
's leadership succeeded in
repelling the enemy.
The town did not suffer any
serious damage in the attack,
and because of this,
became well known as the great
hero who had saved Salrath.
Afterwards, he came to govern
over the town and led Salrath
to prosperity.

outside_event_blocks.english:
, who had performed many
heroic deeds and had grown into
an exceptional knight, returned
safely to his hometown.
He was invited by many kingdoms
to be a knight captain, but he
elected to stay in Salrath for
the sake of his people and serve
the town with his father.
Three years later, monsters
attacked the town, but in a
spectacular display of his
leadership skills, honed in
battle, they were crushed.
His expert battle tactics were
so good that not even a single
monster was able to breach the
town's perimeter.
He was known throughout the
continent for his politeness,
as well as his superb tactics,
and he soon became a model for
aspiring knights everywhere.

outside_event_blocks.english:
, who had grown only
a little from these battles,
returned to Salrath, where
his parents awaited him.
Still far from being a full-
fledged knight, he soon found
himself journeying once again
at his father's behest.
When he returned to Salrath
three years later, he found
the town under attack by a
horde of monsters, remnants
from the war.
Thanks to 's actions, the
town was saved from destruction.
However, his parents were not to
be found among the survivors.
Acutely aware of his lack of
experience, he is said to have
gone off wandering in order to
better himself.

, who had matured somewhat
from these battles, returned
to Salrath, where his parents
awaited him.
Unable to shake the feeling that
he was only half a man, he soon
found himself journeying once
again at his father's behest.
When he returned to Salrath
three years later, he found
the town under attack by a
horde of monsters, remnants
from the war.
Thanks to the selfless actions
of , who had grown into
a full-fledged knight by that
time, the town was safe, but
damaged.
From this battle, he became the
hero of Salrath, and finally
succeeded in fulfilling his
father's expectations of him.

outside_event_blocks.english:
, who had matured quite a
lot from these battles, returned
to Salrath, where his parents
awaited him.
Although could be a bit
reckless at times, his father
was satisfied with his strong
and experienced son.
He later received an invitation
from Kalzath Castle to serve the
head of Kalzath as a knight.
Three years later, a horde of
monsters attacked Salrath, and
the town was driven to the verge
of destruction.
But Salrath made it through
safely, protected by 's
squadron, which had quickly
rushed to the scene.
His courage and gallantry were
highly esteemed, and he was thus
promoted to the famed Imperial
Guard.

outside_event_blocks.english:
, who had gained little
from these battles, returned
to Salrath.
His parents, who had looked
forward in earnest to their
son's maturity, were not able
to hide their disappointment
with his lack of progress.
, who was nearly useless,
soon found himself journeying
once again at his father's
behest.
When he returned to Salrath
three years later, he found
the town under attack by a
horde of monsters, remnants
from the war.
fought with all of his
might, but there was no way he
could repel the invasion with
his lack of strength.
They say he was swallowed up by
the horde of monsters, never to
be seen again.

fought with all of his

outside_event_blocks.english:
, who had learned from his
battles how to effectively crush
the enemy, returned to Salrath,
where his parents awaited him.
Although he had grown strong,
his parents, who saw their son's
total disregard for his own
safety, couldn't help but feel
uneasy about his future.
Three years later, a horde
of monsters attacked the town,
which was driven to the verge
of destruction.
In that desperate, defensive
battle, fought in such
a gallant manner that he was
declared a hero.
He had saved the town, but at
the cost of his young life.

outside_event_blocks.english:
Rejecting the grievous harm she
caused while being manipulated
by , joined the Great
Temple of Light in Estol as a
Sister.
There she spent each day working
towards the happiness of people.
One day a plague began sweeping
across the continent...
Estol, being no exception, was
also exposed to the terrible
plague, but thanks to 's
tireless research, a curative
potion was developed.
And so the continent was able to
overcome the plague.
She was appointed archbishop of
Estol, not just for meritorious
deeds, but also because of her
strong religious faith, vast
knowledge, and gentle heart.
She devoted the rest of her life
to creating a world without war.

outside_event_blocks.english:
Rejecting the grievous harm she
caused while being manipulated
by , joined the Great
Temple of Light in Estol as a
Sister.
There she spent each day working
towards the happiness of people.
One day a plague began sweeping
across the continent...
Estol, being no exception, was
also exposed to the terrible
plague, but thanks to 's
tireless research, magic that
could heal it was invented.
With that one act, she had
eliminated the plague before
it could cause severe damage.
She later became the pope of
Estol, not just for meritorious
deeds, but also because of her
strong religious faith, vast
knowledge, and gentle heart.
She devoted the rest of her life
to creating a world without war.
Her teachings, full of kindness,
spread across the continent and
even brought forth peace.
Having earned the respect of
countless nations, she came
to be regarded by subsequent
generations as a holy woman.

outside_event_blocks.english:
Sadly, 's mental anguish
over harming innocent people
while being manipulated by
had not yet healed.
In order to help alleviate her
pain, she became a Sister at the
Great Temple of Light in Estol.
There she spent each day working
towards the happiness of people.
One day a plague began sweeping
across the continent...
Estol, being no exception, was
also exposed to the terrible
plague. worked tirelessly
at her research, but tragically
it all came to naught.
However, since Alhazard was lost
and the powers of Darkness were
cut off, at least being able to

over harming innocent people
while being manipulated by
had not yet healed.
In order to help alleviate her
pain, she became a Sister at the

There she spent each day working
towards the happiness of people.
One day a plague began sweeping
across the continent...
Estol, being no exception, was

plague, but thanks to 's

outside_event_blocks.english:
As had already become
an adult, began to search
for a different way of life, out
of righteousness.
His actions on the battlefield
not being enough to satisfy him,
together with his underlings he
returned to piracy and a life on
the sea.
However, he was perturbed about
the existence of a huge pirate
group that had laid waste to his
area in the meantime.
The great battle between these
two pirate groups lasted many
days, and 's army, which
was at a numerical disadvantage,
was in serious trouble.
But , who had an abundance
of real battlefield experience,
pulled off a stunning surprise
attack at the end and achieved
a great victory.
He came to be known as the
Pirate King.

outside_event_blocks.english:
As had already become
an adult, began to search
for a different way of life, out
of righteousness.
Having been satisfied with his
many exploits during the war,
he put up his sword and chose
to live a respectable life.
Several years passed, and he
began to fondly remember the
sea. He heard a story about
giant sea monsters that had
laid waste to a nearby port.
, feeling his blood boil,
challenged the monsters alone,
and at the end of the heroic
battle, he had vanquished them.
The people of the port gave him
an enormous reward. Using that
money to buy a ship, they say
he sailed the seas in search of
adventure.

an adult, began to search
for a different way of life, out

many exploits during the war,
he put up his sword and chose

Several years passed, and he

pirate group that was ravaging

, feeling his blood boil,
entered the pirate's hideout

His reputation became known
across the continent and his
honor was praised. It came
to be that a statue of him
was enshrined in every port.

group that had laid waste to his
area in the meantime.
His battle ability was clearly
inferior, but he was not the
kind of man to let something
like that stop him.
, feeling his blood boil,
entered the pirate's hideout
alone, and, after a reckless
battle, repelled them.
However, in one-to-one combat
with the enemy leader,
suffered some deep wounds and
passed away soon afterwards.

outside_event_blocks.english:
As had already become
an adult, began to search
for a different way of life, out
of righteousness.
His actions on the battlefield
not being enough to satisfy him,
together with his underlings he
returned to piracy and a life on
the sea.
But because he was unable to
regain his fervor, and since his
funds had dried up, he began to
raid nearby ports and ships.
After the bad reputation among
sailors of the pirates led by
came to be known, a
single man similar to
appeared.
, after being confronted
by the stranger, was finally
cut down by the man's sword.
As for the rest of the pirates,
it is said that they would
quarrel over how to divide
the treasure they looted
and eventually died out.

outside_event_blocks.english:
Having lost his self-confidence
during the fighting, he returned
meekly to . After a time,
he disappeared into town, hoping
to live a respectable life.
However, having become weak,
the interactions of society
were difficult for him, and
he became lonely.
He somehow managed for a time,
but soon returned to .
was amazed at this,
but could not reject him, as
one might expect. Like long
ago, she put him to work as
a guard at Rahl River.
As for , he believed
himself to be 's
bodyguard, but in actuality,
the reverse was true.

outside_event_blocks.english:
Despite valorous conduct that
helped lead to victory in the
war, he felt like a failure
and became dejected.
Having no plans to enter the
blood-stained battlefield again,
he did a short stint as a pirate
before acting as 's
bodyguard once more.
The doldrums of boredom would
continue until one day some
surviving monsters amassed
into a coordinated group and
advanced on Rahl River.
He fought to protect
and succeeded in repelling the
attack, but was badly hurt and
his body disappeared beneath the
flowing waters of Rahl River.
outside_event_blocks.machine_korean_reference: / 전쟁에서 승리를 가져오는 데 도움이 되었던 / 용감한 행동에도 불구하고, 그는 실패한 것처럼 느꼈다 / 낙담하게 되었다. / 다시는 피묻은 전장에 들어갈 계획이 없이 / 그는 해적으로 잠시 활동했다 / 그 후 다시 한 번 / 경호원으로 활동했다. / 지루함의 부진은 / 어느 날 일부 살아남은 괴물들이 모여서 조화로운 그룹을 이루고 / Rahl 강으로 전진할 때까지 계속될 것입니다. / 그는 보호하기 위해 싸웠고 / 그 공격을 물리치는 데 성공했지만 / 심하게 다쳤고 / 그의 몸은 Rahl 강의 흐르는 물 아래로 사라졌습니다.

outside_event_blocks.english:
Having returned to town,
resumed his life of retirement.
As he was fond of children, he
opened a training school where
swordsmanship was taught, and
the children could build up
both their minds and bodies.
On the side, he would retell his
war stories, and the children
enjoyed them greatly.
Having lived through such trying
times, his stories were popular
for being thrilling, and
became something of a celebrity
among the children in town.
He lived the rest of his life in
peace, surrounded by innocent
children.
