outside_event_blocks.english:
Having returned to town,
resumed his life of retirement.
As he was fond of children, he
opened a training school where
swordsmanship was taught, and
the children could build up
both their minds and bodies.
On the side, he would retell his
war stories, and the children
enjoyed them greatly.
Due to 's influence, he
was even asked to instruct the
sons of aristocrats, and so his
training school came to be the
most famous in the kingdom.
Because of this, a number of
challengers would come calling,
but there were never any who
could compare to his skills,
despite his advanced age.
He lived the rest of his life in
peace, surrounded by innocent
children.

outside_event_blocks.english:
Having returned to town,
resumed his life of retirement.
, who was too lively to die
yet, opened a fencing school for
children, whom he was especially
fond of.
There he not only taught the art
of swordsmanship and built up
minds and bodies, he tried to
cultivate sound hearts as well.
On the side, he would retell his
war stories, and the children
enjoyed them greatly.
One day, during practice with
real swords, he was wounded by
an overzealous pupil, causing
his death.
However, it is said that being
able to die while surrounded
by children, rather than on
the battlefield, made him
truly happy.

outside_event_blocks.english:
Having returned to town,
resumed his life of retirement
and spent the days retelling his
war stories to the children in
town.
Having lived through such trying
times, his stories were popular
for being thrilling, and
became something of a celebrity
among the children in town.
One day his wounds worsened, and
, realizing his death was
near, as if seeking a place to
die, took up his sword once more
and went to the battlefield.
At a certain castle siege, he
chose to join the defensive
side, which was clearly at a
disadvantage, and proceeded
to join in the fray.
His comrades fell one after
another, but he valiantly fought
on. Facing a seemingly endless
onslaught, he too was defeated
and was never seen again.

outside_event_blocks.english:
Having returned to town,
resumed his life of retirement
and spent the days retelling his
war stories to the children in
town.
However, after a short while,
as if seeking a place to die,
he challenged a wicked dragon
who was causing great suffering
in the land.
It was a desperate battle with
great valor, and the evil dragon
lost its life in the end.
However, it is said that, as the
evil dragon was in the throes of
death, its breath engulfed
and he was burned to a crisp
instantaneously.
Some believe that he challenged
it with the intention of dying
from the very beginning.
outside_event_blocks.machine_korean_reference: 마을로 돌아온 후, / 은퇴 생활을 다시 시작하고 / 그의 / 전쟁 이야기를 그 마을에 있는 아이들에게 이야기하면서 나날을 보냈습니다. / 그러나 얼마 후 / 마치 죽을 곳을 찾는 듯 / 사악한 용에게 도전했다 / 큰 고통을 일으키고 있는 / 그 땅에서. / 그것은 / 엄청난 용맹을 지닌 필사적인 전투였고, 사악한 용은 / 결국 목숨을 잃었다. / 그러나 / 그러나 / 사악한 용은 / 죽음의 진통에 빠져 있었기 때문에 / 그 숨결이 삼켰고 / 그는 바삭바삭하게 타버렸다 / 순간적으로. 일부 사람들은 그가 도전했다고 믿는다 / 죽겠다는 의도로 / 처음부터.

outside_event_blocks.english:
Having returned to town,
resumed his life of retirement.
He opened a fencing school for
children, whom he was especially
fond of.
He wanted not only to teach the
art of swordsmanship and build
up minds and bodies, but also
to cultivate sound hearts in
children.
However, as he had not shown any
great valor in the past, there
were no parents who would send
their children to him.
Without even a single student,
he quickly fell into the depths
of poverty.
Suffering from loneliness, it
is said that he died quietly
and alone.

outside_event_blocks.english:
Having returned to town,
resumed his life of retirement.
, who still felt like he
could never lose to youth,
opened a fencing school for
children, whom he adored.
There he not only taught the art
of swordsmanship and built up
minds and bodies, he tried to
cultivate sound hearts as well.
His training school was a
success, and he gathered
many disciples.
But with his wounds reopened, he
fell down one day, and with many
students looking on, silently
passed away.
However, it is said that being
able to die while surrounded
by children, rather than on
the battlefield, made him
truly happy.

outside_event_blocks.english:
Having returned to town,
resumed his life of retirement.
, who still felt like he
could never lose to youth,
opened a fencing school for
children, whom he adored.
There he not only taught the art
of swordsmanship and built up
minds and bodies, he tried to
cultivate sound hearts as well.
His training school was a
success, and he gathered
many disciples.
But because of his old wounds,
he eventually became unable to
hold a sword, and therefore had
to retire.
They say that he lived the rest
of his life in happiness, as he
watched over the children's
training with a warm heart.

This orphanage, which she had

outside_event_blocks.english:
Returning to her home village,
started an orphanage for
those who had lost their parents
during the war.
Together with , who
had returned to her, she
later went to each area
of the continent to build
a peaceful world.
Before long, the many people who
relied on her character came to
finance her, and the orphanage
turned into a learning center.
Time passed, and the orphans,
who had grown up well, also came
to help her. Eventually her wish
was fulfilled; she had succeeded
in ending war on the continent.
They were revered as the ones
who finally brought peace.

outside_event_blocks.english:
Returning to her home village,
started an orphanage for
those who had lost their parents
during the war.
However, there was no one at
that time who would finance
such an unprofitable enterprise.
One day, a messenger from the
castle of a neighboring kingdom
approached , who was lost
in thought at the moment.
A king who had heard rumors of
her beauty wanted her to marry
his son. He said that if she
accepted, he would finance the
orphanage.
She seemed to be quite troubled,
but having no other options, she
had no choice but to accept.
But thanks to her selflessness,
many orphans were saved. As if
to show their gratitude for all
she had done, they grew into
fine adults.

outside_event_blocks.english:
Returning to her home village,
started an orphanage for
those who had lost their parents
during the war.
However, there was no one at
that time who would finance
such an unprofitable enterprise.
But could not stand by and
watch as the war orphans died of
starvation.
Undertaking physical labor, she
chose to do arduous jobs and
somehow managed to scrape the
money together.
But , suffering from
starvation and having put
too much strain on her body,
eventually collapsed.
Unable to realize her dream,
she breathed her last breath.

Returning to her home village,
started an orphanage for
those who had lost their parents
during the war.
However, there was no one at
that time who would finance
such an unprofitable enterprise.
But then a well-mannered man who
had been wooing her promised to
finance it if she married him.
, who was pure of heart and
didn't know how to be wary of
people, married him.
But the man had never intended
to finance the orphanage from
the very beginning; he was only
using her.
, finally realizing that
she had been tricked, grew tired
of her life and is said to have
gone on a journey alone.

outside_event_blocks.english:
Returning to her home village,
started an orphanage for
those who had lost their parents
during the war.
However, there was no one at
that time who would finance
such an unprofitable enterprise.
But then a well-mannered man who
had been wooing her promised to
finance it if she married him.
, who was pure of heart and
didn't know how to be wary of
people, married him.
But the man had never intended
to finance the orphanage from
the very beginning; he was only
using her.
, finally realizing that
she had been tricked, became
independent once again and
managed the orphanage herself.
However the constant exhaustion
ended up ruining her health, and
she quietly passed away.

outside_event_blocks.english:
With the fighting over, he left
his home village and moved into
's laboratory to be her
apprentice, in order to conduct
magical research.
Since he was unable to perform
any great feats in battle, he
primarily studied practical
magic, rather than theory.
As he learned greater and
greater magic, he steadily
grew stronger.
Eventually his talents awoke,
and he became able to handle
things like the discovery of
long-lost ancient magic and even
the development of new spells.
He later left on a journey in
order to help people with his
magic. It is said that he saved
countless lives and was welcomed
by everyone wherever he went.

outside_event_blocks.english:
Leaving the village he had grown
up in, he worked hard on magical
research at 's laboratory
as her apprentice.
There, he not only discovered
powerful, ancient magic, but he
also developed new spells, and
so a great deal of new magic
came into being.
Half of it required the kind of
power that only a small group of
people could control, but thanks
to him the art of magic had been
significantly advanced.
A great revolution in magic was
born, and the teachings of
became the basis for magic on
the continent.
And thus acquired the title
of Great Wizard at a young age.

outside_event_blocks.english:
Leaving the village he had grown
up in, he worked hard on magical
research at 's laboratory
as her apprentice.
There, he not only discovered
powerful, ancient magic, but he
also developed new spells, and
so a great deal of new magic
came into being.
Half of it required the kind of
power that only a small group of
people could control, but thanks
to him the art of magic had been
significantly advanced.
Countless wizards flocked to
him, and before long a wizard
guild on a continental scale
had been formed.
Through the energetic actions
of this guild, magic became
even more refined and advanced.
And so, became known as
the finest Great Wizard in all
of history.

outside_event_blocks.english:
With the fighting over, he left
his home village and moved into
's laboratory to be her
apprentice, in order to conduct
magical research.
Since he was unable to perform
any great feats in battle, he
primarily studied practical
magic, rather than theory.
At one point he tried to study
even higher-level practical
magic, but it seemed to elude
his powers of comprehension.
Eventually he started dabbling
in the research of new magic,
but all he produced was useless,
childish spells.
Perhaps this was because he did
not understand the fundamental
nature of magic very well.
Seemingly content with his
abilities, it is said that
he continued developing
weird spells.

outside_event_blocks.english:
With the fighting over, he left
his home village and moved into
's laboratory to be her
apprentice, in order to conduct
magical research.
, who had recognized his own
inexperience, studied various
kinds of magic under .
At one point he thought up
a simple method of fortune-
telling using magic.
He would then do things like
predict the following day's
weather or look up healing
remedies for people who were
sick.
Because his success rate was
high, he was revered by the
people in his area.
Eventually he used this skill to
find an ancient royal treasure.
He became very rich, and lived
an extravagant life.

outside_event_blocks.english:
Leaving the village he had grown
up in, he worked hard on magical
research at 's laboratory
as her apprentice.
, who had recognized his own
inexperience, studied various
kinds of magic under .
On the side, he started to work
on the rediscovery of ancient
magic, and eventually he was
rewarded.
He found a powerful spell to
control the climate at will,
and became able to prevent crop
failures caused by things like
droughts.
News spread, and he was summoned
by the kings and aristocrats to
manipulate the weather in each
kingdom.
It is said that, thanks to him,
the entire continent became
prosperous and countless people
were able to live in happiness.

had confidence in his own
magic, but because of his poor
performance during the war,
he eventually admitted his own
powerlessness.
To him who dreamed of becoming
a first-class wizard, the shock
was unbearable.
He regained his determination
and began to consider starting
his magical education over from
birth.
So he studied the reincarnation
magic that could use
naturally, and bet everything
on his next life.
But, being incompetent, that
sort of high-level magic was
beyond his ken, so nobody has
heard of his reappearance yet.

outside_event_blocks.english:
had confidence in his own
magic, but because of his poor
performance during the war,
he eventually realized his
lack of experience.
So became an apprentice
of and studied various
kinds of magic under her.
Eventually, he too started to
acquire some power and became
able to control intermediate-
level magic, which gave him
confidence.
Because of this, he wanted to
try a spell that had
told him to stay away from,
and so, in secret, he tried
casting the magic.
It was a forbidden spell that
summoned a mighty demon. ,
who had failed to control the
monster, was dragged into the
netherworld.

outside_event_blocks.english:
Leaving the village he had grown
up in, he worked hard on magical
research at 's laboratory
as her apprentice.
Having completely forgotten
the defeats he suffered in the
war, would only remember
his great accomplishments.
Because of that, he developed
delusions of grandeur and wound
up with an arrogant and selfish
personality.
He eventually found a powerful
spell to control the climate at
will, and became able to prevent
crop failures caused by things
like droughts.
He offered to manipulate the
weather of each area, but his
asking price was extremely
steep, which caused a great
deal of animosity.
One day he lost his life to the
sword of a person who had been
driven temporarily insane out
of anger at the outrageous sums
demanded.
outside_event_blocks.machine_korean_reference: 그가 자란 마을을 떠나 / 자란 마을을 떠나, 그는 열심히 마법을 일했다 / '의 연구실에서 / 그녀의 견습생으로서. / 완전히 잊은 채 / 그가 겪었던 패배를 / 전쟁에서, 오직 기억할 것이다 / 그의 위대한 업적 / 그 때문에 그는 발전했다 / 과대망상과 상처를 입었다 / 오만하고 이기적인 / 성격으로. / 그는 결국 강력한 / 의지를 통제하는 주문을 발견했고, 예방할 수 있게 되었다 / 가뭄과 같은 것들로 인한 농작물 실패. 그는 각 지역의 날씨를 조작하겠다고 제안했지만, 그의 요구 가격은 극도로 가파르고, 이는 상당한 적개심을 불러일으켰습니다. / 어느 날 그는 목숨을 잃었다 / 한 사람의 칼에 찔려 / 일시적으로 미치게 된 / 터무니없는 금액에 대한 분노로 / 요구했다.

outside_event_blocks.english:
The conflict between Light and
Darkness that had taken place
since time immemorial finally
came to an end, all thanks to
and the others.
During the war he had acquired
something important: friends he
could trust. They were able to
share not only their hearts,
but their lives as well.
Within his heart, the images of
every one of them came vividly
back to life.
But despite being victorious,
the war had made him realize
his own inexperience.
When they came to visit him
early one morning, they found
his bed empty. Seeking lands
yet unseen, he had started
out on a new adventure.
And so it all became legend...

outside_event_blocks.english:
The conflict between Light and
Darkness that had taken place
since time immemorial finally
came to an end, all thanks to
and the others.
During the war he had acquired
something important: friends he
could trust. They were able to
share not only their hearts,
but their lives as well.
Within his heart, the images of
every one of them came vividly
back to life.
However, as his was a nature
averse to staying in one spot
for very long, he disappeared
at some point. He likely went
on another adventure.
Later on, legends of a single
hero who had accomplished many
great deeds arose in every part
of the continent...
They say that the young man wore
a silver tiara in the shape of
wings.
And so it all became legend...

outside_event_blocks.english:
The conflict between Light and
Darkness that had taken place
since time immemorial finally
came to an end, all thanks to
and the others.
Throughout the many battles
both his swordsmanship and
he himself greatly matured.
Yet he had acquired something
even more important: friends he
could trust. They were able to
share not only their hearts,
but their lives as well.
Within his heart, the images of
every one of them came vividly
back to life.
However, as his was a nature
averse to staying in one spot
for very long, he disappeared
at some point. He likely went
on another adventure.
Many years later, an intense war
occurred in a nearby continent.
They say a young man appeared
there and single-handedly ended
the war.
The man didn't even give his
name, but it is said that he
wore a silver tiara in the
shape of wings.
And so it all became legend...

outside_event_blocks.english:
The conflict between Light and
Darkness that had taken place
since time immemorial finally
came to an end, all thanks to
and the others.
The bodies of enemies, allies,
and countless soldiers had lain
strewn about. Even in the towns
and villages, the number of
victims was great.
The lands and houses had burned
to cinders, and many people lost
their parents and loved ones.
All that sadness will likely
spawn a new war.
The ravages of the war with
the Empire seem like wounds
that will never fully heal.
During the war, gained
something even greater than mere
victory. It was the trust of his
friends that came from uniting
their hearts.
Within his heart, the images of
every one of them came vividly
back to life, every single day.
]Men's hearts are weak, and
those who don't believe in
anyone will hurt others."
had not been able
to achieve a world without war
through force. That would not
have been true peace.
truly understood the
preciousness of hearts capable
of trusting friends and others.
He accompanied on a
journey in order to build
an ideal world in which all
people could trust each other...
...To build a world in which
wars would never happen again.
And so it all became legend...
